`; } // ── WebLLM: client-side inference for zero-cost scoring ───────────────────── const WEBLLM_MODELS = [ 'gemma-2-2b-it-q4f16_1-MLC', 'Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct-q4f16_1-MLC', ]; let _webllmInitPromise = null; function webllmSupported() { return !!(window.__webllm && window.__webllm.supported); } function getWebLLMStatusEl() { let el = document.getElementById('webllm-status'); if (!el) { el = document.createElement('div'); el.id = 'webllm-status'; el.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;bottom:16px;right:16px;background:var(--bg2,#1a1a2e);border:1px solid var(--bdr,#333);border-radius:10px;padding:10px 16px;font-size:12px;color:var(--tx,#ccc);z-index:9999;display:none;max-width:340px;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)'; document.body.appendChild(el); } return el; } function showWebLLMStatus(text, progress) { const el = getWebLLMStatusEl(); el.style.display = 'block'; const pct = typeof progress === 'number' ? progress : -1; el.innerHTML = pct >= 0 ? `
🧠 Local AI — ${escapeHtml(text)}
${Math.round(pct*100)}%
` : `
🧠 Local AI — ${escapeHtml(text)}
`; } function hideWebLLMStatus() { const el = document.getElementById('webllm-status'); if (el) el.style.display = 'none'; } async function initWebLLM() { if (!webllmSupported()) return false; const wl = window.__webllm; if (wl.ready && wl.engine) return true; if (wl.loading) return _webllmInitPromise; wl.loading = true; _webllmInitPromise = (async () => { try { showWebLLMStatus('Checking GPU capabilities…'); const adapter = await navigator.gpu.requestAdapter(); if (!adapter) { wl.error = 'No WebGPU adapter'; wl.loading = false; hideWebLLMStatus(); return false; } showWebLLMStatus('Downloading model (first time only)…', 0); let engine = null; let loadedModel = ''; for (const modelId of WEBLLM_MODELS) { try { engine = await wl.CreateMLCEngine(modelId, { initProgressCallback: (report) => { const pct = report.progress || 0; const label = report.text || 'Loading…'; showWebLLMStatus(label.length > 60 ? label.slice(0, 57) + '…' : label, pct); }, logLevel: 'SILENT', }, { context_window_size: 4096, }); loadedModel = modelId; break; } catch (modelErr) { console.warn(`WebLLM: ${modelId} failed, trying next…`, modelErr.message); } } if (!engine) throw new Error('All WebLLM models failed to load'); wl.engine = engine; wl.modelId = loadedModel; wl.ready = true; wl.loading = false; showWebLLMStatus('Ready — scoring runs locally on your device'); setTimeout(hideWebLLMStatus, 3000); return true; } catch (e) { console.warn('WebLLM init failed:', e); wl.error = e.message; wl.loading = false; hideWebLLMStatus(); return false; } })(); return _webllmInitPromise; } async function aiLocal(prompt, max = 3000) { const wl = window.__webllm; if (!wl?.ready || !wl.engine) throw new Error('WebLLM not ready'); const reply = await wl.engine.chat.completions.create({ messages: [{ role: 'user', content: prompt }], max_tokens: max, temperature: 0.3, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, }); const text = reply.choices?.[0]?.message?.content || ''; if (!text || text.length < 50) throw new Error('Local model produced insufficient output'); return text; } // Pre-warm WebLLM in background when the page is idle function updateWebLLMBadge() { const badge = document.getElementById('webllm-badge'); if (!badge) return; const wl = window.__webllm; if (!wl?.supported) { badge.style.display = 'none'; return; } badge.style.display = 'block'; if (wl.ready) { badge.innerHTML = '🧠 Local AI ready — unlimited free scoring on your device'; } else if (wl.loading) { badge.innerHTML = '🧠 Preparing local AI… (first time only)'; } else if (wl.error) { badge.innerHTML = '☁️ Cloud scoring — your browser doesn\'t support local AI'; } else { badge.innerHTML = '🧠 Local AI available — will download on first use'; } } if (typeof requestIdleCallback === 'function') { requestIdleCallback(() => { if (webllmSupported()) initWebLLM().then(updateWebLLMBadge); else updateWebLLMBadge(); }, { timeout: 5000 }); } else { setTimeout(() => { if (webllmSupported()) initWebLLM().then(updateWebLLMBadge); else updateWebLLMBadge(); }, 3000); } setTimeout(updateWebLLMBadge, 1500); async function scoreIdea() { const desc = document.getElementById('project-desc').value.trim(); if (!desc || !INFERRED) return; const btn = document.getElementById('score-btn'); btn.disabled = true; btn.textContent = 'Researching market data…'; showLoadingOverlay('Researching market...', 'Pulling competitor data, market size, and SEO demand signals'); const research = await runPreBuildResearch(INFERRED.name || desc.slice(0, 50), INFERRED.location || 'United States'); const researchContext = research?.summary || ''; btn.textContent = 'Analyzing with ' + V2_FRAMEWORKS.length + ' frameworks…'; showLoadingOverlay('Scoring viability...', `Analyzing with ${V2_FRAMEWORKS.length} frameworks${research?.sources?.length ? ' + ' + research.sources.join(', ') + ' data' : ''}`); const fwList = V2_FRAMEWORKS.map(f => FW_PROMPTS[f] || '').filter(Boolean).join('\n\n'); const depthMod = DEPTH_MODIFIERS[FW_DEPTH] || DEPTH_MODIFIERS.standard; const scoringPrompt = `You are a business strategist. Analyze this business idea and return a viability scorecard. DEPTH: ${FW_DEPTH.toUpperCase()} — ${depthMod} PROJECT: ${sanitizePromptInput(desc)} CONFIG: ${JSON.stringify(INFERRED, null, 2)} ${researchContext ? `\nMARKET DATA:\n${researchContext}` : ''} FRAMEWORKS: ${fwList} Return ONLY valid JSON: { "scores": { "market_hunger": { "score": 0.0, "rationale": "..." }, "blue_ocean_index": { "score": 0.0, "rationale": "..." }, "competitive_moat": { "score": 0.0, "rationale": "..." }, "revenue_confidence": { "score": 0.0, "rationale": "..." }, "mvp_feasibility": { "score": 0.0, "rationale": "..." } }, "composite": 0.0, "verdict": "STRONG BUILD CANDIDATE or VIABLE WITH CAVEATS or NEEDS REFINEMENT", "risk_summary": "1-2 sentences", "opportunity_summary": "1-2 sentences", "framework_analyses": { "blue_ocean": "analysis..." ${V2_FRAMEWORKS.includes('porters') ? ',"porters": "analysis with scored table..."' : ''} ${V2_FRAMEWORKS.includes('seven-powers') ? ',"seven_powers": "analysis per power..."' : ''} ${V2_FRAMEWORKS.includes('jtbd') ? ',"jtbd": "JTBD analysis..."' : ''} ${V2_FRAMEWORKS.includes('lean-canvas') ? ',"lean_canvas": "Complete 9-block lean canvas..."' : ''} ${V2_FRAMEWORKS.includes('tam-sam-som') ? ',"tam_sam_som": "TAM: $X, SAM: $X, SOM: $X with methodology and sources..."' : ''} ${V2_FRAMEWORKS.includes('unit-economics') ? ',"unit_economics": "CAC: $X, LTV: $X, LTV:CAC ratio: X:1, Payback: X months, Gross margin: X%. FLAG if unsustainable..."' : ''} ${V2_FRAMEWORKS.includes('competitive-matrix') ? ',"competitive_matrix": "Competitors: [name1, name2, name3]. Axes: [axis1 vs axis2]. Positioning: [where each plots]. Gap exploited: ..."' : ''} } } All scores 0.0-10.0. Be honest — do not inflate. Weighted average: market_hunger 25%, blue_ocean 20%, moat 20%, revenue 20%, feasibility 15%.`; let raw = ''; let scoredLocally = false; try { // Hybrid path: try WebLLM first (zero cost), fall back to server const webllmReady = webllmSupported() && window.__webllm?.ready; if (webllmReady) { try { showLoadingOverlay('Scoring locally...', 'Running AI analysis on your device — no server calls, unlimited usage'); btn.textContent = 'Scoring on your device…'; raw = await aiLocal(scoringPrompt, FW_DEPTH === 'deep' ? 4000 : FW_DEPTH === 'quick' ? 1500 : 3000); scoredLocally = true; } catch (localErr) { console.warn('Local scoring failed, falling back to server:', localErr); raw = ''; } } if (!raw) { showLoadingOverlay('Scoring viability...', `Analyzing with ${V2_FRAMEWORKS.length} frameworks (cloud)`); btn.textContent = 'Analyzing (cloud)…'; raw = await aiRaw(`${PROMPT_ARMOR}${scoringPrompt}`, FW_DEPTH === 'deep' ? 8000 : FW_DEPTH === 'quick' ? 3000 : 6000); } let cleaned = (raw || '').replace(/```json\s*/g, '').replace(/```\s*/g, '').trim(); const m = cleaned.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/); if (!m) throw new Error('No JSON in scorecard response (raw length: ' + (raw||'').length + ', first 100: ' + (raw||'').slice(0,100) + ')'); V2_SCORECARD = safeJsonParse(m[0]); if (!V2_SCORECARD) throw new Error('JSON parse failed'); if (!V2_SCORECARD.composite && V2_SCORECARD.composite_score) V2_SCORECARD.composite = V2_SCORECARD.composite_score; if (!V2_SCORECARD.composite && V2_SCORECARD.overall_score) V2_SCORECARD.composite = V2_SCORECARD.overall_score; if (!V2_SCORECARD.composite && V2_SCORECARD.viability_score) V2_SCORECARD.composite = V2_SCORECARD.viability_score; if (!V2_SCORECARD.composite && V2_SCORECARD.total_score) V2_SCORECARD.composite = V2_SCORECARD.total_score; if (!V2_SCORECARD.composite && V2_SCORECARD.scores) { const vals = Object.values(V2_SCORECARD.scores).map(v => typeof v === 'object' ? v.score : v).filter(n => typeof n === 'number'); if (vals.length > 0) V2_SCORECARD.composite = vals.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / vals.length; } if (typeof V2_SCORECARD.composite === 'string') V2_SCORECARD.composite = parseFloat(V2_SCORECARD.composite) || 0; if (!V2_SCORECARD.composite) V2_SCORECARD.composite = 0; if (!V2_SCORECARD.scores) V2_SCORECARD.scores = {}; if (!V2_SCORECARD.verdict) V2_SCORECARD.verdict = V2_SCORECARD.composite >= 8 ? 'STRONG BUILD CANDIDATE' : V2_SCORECARD.composite >= 6 ? 'VIABLE WITH CAVEATS' : 'NEEDS REFINEMENT'; V2_SCORECARD._scored_locally = scoredLocally; hideLoadingOverlay(); renderScorecard(V2_SCORECARD); document.getElementById('scorecard-wrap').style.display = 'block'; if (V2_FRAMEWORKS.length >= 3 && FW_DEPTH !== 'quick') { showLoadingOverlay('Synthesizing...', 'Cross-referencing framework results for consensus signals and contradictions'); const syn = await runCrossFrameworkSynthesis(V2_SCORECARD); hideLoadingOverlay(); if (syn) renderSynthesis(syn); } btn.textContent = scoredLocally ? 'Score again ↻ (local)' : 'Score again ↻'; btn.disabled = false; } catch (e) { hideLoadingOverlay(); console.error('Scoring error:', e); const msg = String(e?.message || ''); if (msg.includes('free score') && msg.includes('Sign in')) { const shouldSignIn = confirm('You\u2019ve used your 3 guest scores this month.\n\nSign in with your email to unlock 6 scores per month.\n\nClick OK to sign in now.'); if (shouldSignIn) { try { const authed = await requireAuth(); if (authed) alert('Scoring unlocked: you now have 6 scores this month.'); } catch {} } } else if (msg.includes('registered free scores')) { const shouldUpgrade = confirm('You\u2019ve used your 6 registered scores this month.\n\nUpgrade to Scoring Pro ($19/month) for ongoing scoring access.\n\nClick OK to continue.'); if (shouldUpgrade) startCheckout('scoring_pro'); } else if (msg.includes('Scoring Pro fair-use limit reached')) { alert('Your Scoring Pro fair-use threshold is reached for this month. Contact support to raise your scoring limit.'); } btn.textContent = 'Scoring failed — try again'; btn.title = e.message || 'Unknown error'; btn.disabled = false; } } function renderScorecard(sc) { const s = sc.scores; const cls = n => n >= 8 ? 'high' : n >= 6 ? 'mid' : 'low'; const vcls = sc.composite >= 8 ? 'strong' : sc.composite >= 6 ? 'viable' : 'weak'; document.getElementById('scorecard').innerHTML = `
Dynasty Viability Scorecard${sc._scored_locally ? '🧠 Scored locally' : ''}
${Object.entries(s).map(([k, v]) => `
${escapeHtml(k.replace(/_/g, ' ').replace(/\b\w/g, c => c.toUpperCase()))} ${(typeof v.score === 'number' ? v.score : 0).toFixed(1)} / 10
`).join('')}
Composite Score ${sc.composite.toFixed(1)} / 10
${escapeHtml(sc.verdict)}
Risk: ${escapeHtml(sc.risk_summary)}
Opportunity: ${escapeHtml(sc.opportunity_summary)}
`; const dives = document.getElementById('fw-deep-dives'); dives.innerHTML = Object.entries(sc.framework_analyses || {}).map(([k, v]) => `
${escapeHtml(k.replace(/_/g, ' ').replace(/\b\w/g, c => c.toUpperCase()))} Analysis ▼
${generateFrameworkVisual(k, v, sc.scores)}
${escapeHtml(typeof v === 'string' ? v : (v?.analysis || v?.summary || v?.text || JSON.stringify(v, null, 2)))}
`).join(''); } // ── Visual Framework Outputs (SVG) ─────────────────────────────────────────── function generateFrameworkVisual(framework, analysis, scores) { const gold = '#C9A84C'; const grn = '#3ECF8E'; const red = '#E5534B'; const dim = '#4A4845'; const card = '#1E1E1E'; const tx = '#EEEDE8'; if (framework === 'blue_ocean') { // Strategy Canvas — radar-style comparison const s = scores; const mh = s?.market_hunger?.score || 5; const bo = s?.blue_ocean_index?.score || 5; const cm = s?.competitive_moat?.score || 5; const rc = s?.revenue_confidence?.score || 5; const mf = s?.mvp_feasibility?.score || 5; return ``; } if (framework === 'porters') { // Pentagon diagram const forces = ['Suppliers','Buyers','Rivalry','Substitutes','New Entry']; const cx = 150; const cy = 95; const r = 55; return ``; } if (framework === 'seven_powers') { // Radar chart with 7 axes const powers = ['Scale','Network','Counter-Pos','Switching','Brand','Resource','Process']; const cx = 150; const cy = 100; const r = 55; return ``; } if (framework === 'lean_canvas') { // 9-block grid const blocks = ['Problem','Solution','Key Metrics','Unfair Advantage','Channels','Segments','Cost Structure','Revenue Streams','Value Prop']; return ``; } if (framework === 'tam_sam_som') { // Concentric circles return ``; } if (framework === 'unit_economics') { // LTV:CAC bar const ratio = 3; // placeholder return ``; } if (framework === 'competitive_matrix') { // 2x2 scatter plot return ``; } if (framework === 'jtbd') { // Forces of progress diagram return ``; } return ''; // no visual for this framework } async function populateModels() { const data = await loadModels(); const grid = document.getElementById('model-grid'); if (!data.models) return; grid.innerHTML = Object.entries(data.models) .filter(([, m]) => m.available) .sort((a, b) => a[1].free === b[1].free ? 0 : a[1].free ? -1 : 1) .map(([id, m]) => `
${m.label}
${m.provider}
${m.free ? 'FREE' : m.estimatedBuildCost}
`).join(''); populatePhaseModels(data.models); } function selectModel(id, el) { V2_MODEL = id; document.querySelectorAll('.model-chip').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('selected')); el.classList.add('selected'); document.getElementById('model-cost').innerHTML = 'Estimated build cost: ' + (el.dataset.cost || '~$0.00') + ''; } function populatePhaseModels(models) { const phases = [ { id: 'strategy', label: 'Strategy / Scorecard' }, { id: 'design', label: 'Design System' }, { id: 'docs', label: 'Product Docs' }, { id: 'business', label: 'Business System' }, { id: 'backend', label: 'Backend Code' }, { id: 'frontend', label: 'Frontend Code' }, ]; const opts = Object.entries(models).filter(([, m]) => m.available) .map(([id, m]) => ``).join(''); document.getElementById('phase-models').innerHTML = phases.map(p => `
`).join(''); } let V2_CATEGORY = 'backend'; // saas|enterprise|ai|dashboard|service|directory|ecom|authority|landing|wordpress|backend|suitedash function selectCategory(el, target, category) { V2_DEPLOY_TARGET = target; V2_CATEGORY = category; document.querySelectorAll('#category-grid .deploy-card').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('selected')); el.classList.add('selected'); } // Category → type_id override map (forces correct type when AI is ambiguous) const CATEGORY_TYPE_HINTS = { 'saas': ['dark-saas','gov-saas','compliance'], 'enterprise': ['enterprise-saas'], 'ai': ['ai-platform','ai-chat','ai-dashboard'], 'dashboard': ['client-portal','ai-dashboard','crm'], 'service': ['booking-service','signing-service','lead-gen','crm'], 'directory': ['bd-dir','member-dir','job-board'], 'ecom': ['ecom'], 'authority': ['auth-gen','auth-pest','auth-imm','auth-freight','auth-legal','auth-hvac','auth-med'], 'landing': ['landing'], 'wordpress': ['wp-theme'], 'backend': ['api-svc','dark-saas','custom'], 'suitedash': ['suitedash-niche'], }; function selectDeploy(el, target) { V2_DEPLOY_TARGET = target; document.querySelectorAll('.deploy-card').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('selected')); el.classList.add('selected'); } function backToFrameworks() { document.getElementById('config-screen').style.display = 'none'; document.getElementById('framework-screen').style.display = 'block'; } function showConfigScreen() { populateModels(); const grid = document.getElementById('cfg-inf-grid'); if (INFERRED) { grid.innerHTML = `
Project
${INFERRED.name}
Type
${INFERRED.type_label}
Revenue
${INFERRED.revenue_model} · ${INFERRED.price}
Stack
${(INFERRED.stack || []).slice(0, 4).join(', ')}
Frameworks
${V2_FRAMEWORKS.length} selected
Viability
${V2_SCORECARD ? V2_SCORECARD.composite.toFixed(1) + '/10' : 'Not scored'}
`; } document.getElementById('config-screen').style.display = 'block'; try { const bp = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('dynasty_build_profile') || '{}'); const a = document.getElementById('dynasty-archetype'); if (a && bp.archetype) a.value = bp.archetype; const pl = document.getElementById('dynasty-plain-lang'); if (pl && bp.plainLanguage) pl.checked = true; const vt = document.getElementById('dynasty-vertical-tool'); if (vt && bp.verticalTool) vt.checked = true; const vs = document.getElementById('dynasty-vertical-spec'); if (vs && bp.verticalToolSpec) vs.value = bp.verticalToolSpec; const aiOpt = document.getElementById('dynasty-ai-train-optin'); if (aiOpt && bp.aiTrainingOptIn) aiOpt.checked = true; const govPk = document.getElementById('dynasty-gov-pack'); if (govPk && bp.govContractingPack) govPk.checked = true; } catch {} applyBuildPackageTierConstraints(); } function advanceFromFrameworks() { document.getElementById('framework-screen').style.display = 'none'; showConfigScreen(); } // ── Post-Scorecard Options ───────────────────────────────────────────── function buildAsIs() { advanceFromFrameworks(); } async function getRefinements() { const btn = event.target.closest('.sc-action'); btn.style.opacity = '.5'; btn.style.pointerEvents = 'none'; const desc = document.getElementById('project-desc').value.trim(); const resultsDiv = document.getElementById('refinement-results'); resultsDiv.style.display = 'block'; resultsDiv.innerHTML = '

Generating refinement suggestions...

'; try { const raw = await aiRaw(`${PROMPT_ARMOR}You are a business optimization expert. The user has this business idea with a viability score of ${V2_SCORECARD.composite}/10. IDEA: ${sanitizePromptInput(desc)} SCORECARD: ${JSON.stringify(V2_SCORECARD.scores, null, 2)} VERDICT: ${V2_SCORECARD.verdict} RISKS: ${V2_SCORECARD.risk_summary} Suggest 4 specific, actionable refinements that would improve the viability score. For each, predict the score improvement. Return ONLY valid JSON array: [ { "title": "Short title (5-8 words)", "description": "2-3 sentences explaining the refinement and why it helps.", "predicted_impact": "+1.2 composite", "target_dimension": "market_hunger" }, ...3 more ]`, 2000); const m = raw.match(/\[[\s\S]*\]/); if (!m) throw new Error('Invalid response'); const refinements = JSON.parse(m[0]); window._refinements = refinements; window._selectedRefinements = new Set(); resultsDiv.innerHTML = '

Suggested Refinements — select all that apply

' + refinements.map((r, i) => `
✓
${escapeHtml(r.title)}

${escapeHtml(r.description)}

Predicted: ${escapeHtml(r.predicted_impact)} (${escapeHtml(r.target_dimension?.replace(/_/g,' '))})
`).join('') + '
' + '' + '' + '
'; } catch (e) { resultsDiv.innerHTML = '

Failed to generate refinements. Try again.

'; } btn.style.opacity = '1'; btn.style.pointerEvents = 'auto'; } function toggleRefinement(idx) { const card = document.getElementById('ref-card-' + idx); if (window._selectedRefinements.has(idx)) { window._selectedRefinements.delete(idx); card.classList.remove('selected'); } else { window._selectedRefinements.add(idx); card.classList.add('selected'); } const btn = document.getElementById('apply-refinements-btn'); const count = window._selectedRefinements.size; btn.disabled = count === 0; btn.textContent = count === 0 ? 'Select refinements above' : 'Apply ' + count + ' refinement' + (count > 1 ? 's' : '') + ' →'; } function selectAllRefinements() { window._refinements.forEach((_, i) => { if (!window._selectedRefinements.has(i)) toggleRefinement(i); }); } async function applySelectedRefinements() { const selected = Array.from(window._selectedRefinements).map(i => window._refinements[i]).filter(Boolean); if (selected.length === 0) return; const desc = document.getElementById('project-desc').value.trim(); const additions = selected.map(r => 'REFINEMENT: ' + r.title + ' — ' + r.description).join('\n\n'); document.getElementById('project-desc').value = desc + '\n\n' + additions; INFERRED = null; document.getElementById('refinement-results').innerHTML = '

Re-inferring with ' + selected.length + ' refinement' + (selected.length > 1 ? 's' : '') + ' applied...

'; await inferConfig(document.getElementById('project-desc').value.trim()); document.getElementById('refinement-results').innerHTML = '

✓ ' + selected.length + ' refinement' + (selected.length > 1 ? 's' : '') + ' applied.

Scoring is free. Build credit is only consumed when the build starts.

'; } // ── Multi-Model Pivot Review Pipeline ────────────────────────────────── // Review models — full pool including free/open-weight models. More voters = stronger consensus. const REVIEW_MODELS_POOL = [ // ── Paid frontier models (highest weight — strongest reasoning) ───────── { id: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', label: 'Claude Sonnet 4', icon: '🟣', color: '#A855F7', weight: 1.5 }, { id: 'gpt-4o', label: 'GPT-4o', icon: '🟢', color: '#22C55E', weight: 1.3 }, { id: 'deepseek-chat', label: 'DeepSeek V3', icon: '🟠', color: '#F97316', weight: 1.1 }, { id: 'gemini-2.5-pro', label: 'Gemini 2.5 Pro', icon: '💎', color: '#4285F4', weight: 1.2 }, { id: 'mistral-large-latest', label: 'Mistral Large', icon: '🟡', color: '#FACC15', weight: 1.0 }, // ── Free frontier-class models (strong reasoning, zero cost) ─────────── { id: 'gemini-2.5-flash', label: 'Gemini 2.5 Flash', icon: '🔷', color: '#4285F4', weight: 1.0 }, { id: 'gemini-2.0-flash', label: 'Gemini 2.0 Flash', icon: '⚡', color: '#34A853', weight: 0.7 }, { id: 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile', label: 'Llama 3.3 70B', icon: '🟤', color: '#A16207', weight: 0.9 }, { id: 'mixtral-8x7b-32768', label: 'Mixtral 8x7B', icon: '🔵', color: '#3B82F6', weight: 0.7 }, // ── Free open-weight via OpenRouter (diverse perspectives, zero cost) ── { id: 'meta-llama/llama-3.3-70b-instruct:free', label: 'Llama 3.3 70B (OR)', icon: '🦙', color: '#8B5CF6', weight: 0.6 }, { id: 'google/gemma-2-9b-it:free', label: 'Gemma 2 9B (OR)', icon: '💠', color: '#06B6D4', weight: 0.5 }, { id: 'microsoft/phi-3-mini-128k-instruct:free', label: 'Phi-3 Mini (OR)', icon: '🔹', color: '#00BCF2', weight: 0.5 }, // ── Smaller/faster free models (lower weight but add diversity) ──────── { id: 'llama-3.1-8b-instant', label: 'Llama 3.1 8B', icon: '🐪', color: '#D97706', weight: 0.4 }, { id: 'gemma2-9b-it', label: 'Gemma 2 9B', icon: '🔶', color: '#0EA5E9', weight: 0.4 }, { id: 'mistral-small-latest', label: 'Mistral Small', icon: '🌕', color: '#EAB308', weight: 0.5 }, // ── Ollama (self-hosted — available when OLLAMA_URL env var is set) ──── { id: 'ollama/gemma4', label: 'Gemma 4 (Ollama)', icon: '🏠', color: '#06B6D4', weight: 0.9 }, { id: 'ollama/llama3.3', label: 'Llama 3.3 (Ollama)', icon: '🏠', color: '#A16207', weight: 0.8 }, { id: 'ollama/deepseek-r1', label: 'DeepSeek R1 (Ollama)', icon: '🏠', color: '#F97316', weight: 0.8 }, { id: 'ollama/qwen3', label: 'Qwen 3 (Ollama)', icon: '🏠', color: '#8B5CF6', weight: 0.8 }, ]; let REVIEW_MODELS = REVIEW_MODELS_POOL.slice(0, 7); // default fallback // Dynamically filter to only models with working API keys — no cap async function initReviewModels() { try { const data = await loadModels(); const available = data.models || {}; const working = REVIEW_MODELS_POOL.filter(m => available[m.id]?.available); const freeOnly = REVIEW_MODELS_POOL.filter(m => available[m.id]?.available && available[m.id]?.free); if (isFreeTier() && freeOnly.length >= 3) { REVIEW_MODELS = freeOnly; console.log(`Review pipeline (free tier): ${REVIEW_MODELS.length} free models`); return REVIEW_MODELS; } if (working.length >= 3) { REVIEW_MODELS = working; // USE ALL AVAILABLE — more voters = better consensus console.log(`Review pipeline: ${REVIEW_MODELS.length} models available — ${REVIEW_MODELS.map(m => m.label).join(', ')}`); } else { console.warn(`Only ${working.length} models have keys — using top 7 from pool`); REVIEW_MODELS = REVIEW_MODELS_POOL.slice(0, 7); } } catch {} return REVIEW_MODELS; } async function aiRawWithModel(prompt, modelId, max = 4000) { const freeTier = isFreeTier(); const fallbackModels = freeTier ? [modelId, 'gemma-4-31b-it', 'gemma-4-26b-a4b-it', 'gemini-2.0-flash', 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile', 'llama-3.1-8b-instant'] : [modelId, 'gemma-4-31b-it', 'gemma-4-26b-a4b-it', 'gemini-2.0-flash', 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile', 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001']; for (let attempt = 0; attempt < fallbackModels.length; attempt++) { const useModel = fallbackModels[attempt]; try { if (attempt > 0) console.warn(`aiRawWithModel fallback: ${useModel}`); const r = await fetch('/api/ai', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ model: useModel, max_tokens: max, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: prompt }], ...getAiAuthPayload(), usage_context: freeTier ? 'free_scoring' : 'standard' }) }); let d = null; try { d = await r.json(); } catch {} if (r.status === 429) { const errMsg = d?.error || d?.message || ''; if (String(errMsg).includes('guest scores') || String(errMsg).includes('registered free scores') || String(errMsg).includes('Scoring Pro fair-use limit')) { throw new Error(errMsg); } await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r, 3000*(attempt+1))); continue; } if (!r.ok) { const errMsg = d?.error || d?.message || ('AI API ' + r.status); if (attempt < fallbackModels.length-1) { await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,2000)); continue; } throw new Error(errMsg); } if (d.error) { if (d.error.message?.includes('overloaded') || d.error.message?.includes('rate')) { await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,3000)); continue; } if (attempt < fallbackModels.length-1) { await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,2000)); continue; } throw new Error(d.error.message || 'AI error'); } if (d._cost?.estimated_cost) V2_BUILD_COST += d._cost.estimated_cost; const costEl = document.getElementById('build-cost'); if (costEl && V2_BUILD_COST > 0) { costEl.style.display = 'block'; document.getElementById('cost-val').textContent = '$' + V2_BUILD_COST.toFixed(4); } const text = d.content?.find(b => b.type === 'text')?.text || ''; if (text) return text; if (attempt < fallbackModels.length-1) { await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,2000)); continue; } return ''; } catch(e) { if (attempt < fallbackModels.length-1) { await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,2000)); continue; } throw e; } } return ''; } function showPipelineUI() { const div = document.getElementById('pipeline-screen'); div.style.display = 'block'; document.getElementById('sc-actions').style.display = 'none'; div.innerHTML = `
🧠 ${REVIEW_MODELS.length}-model pivot review pipeline
Phase 1: Independent Analysis Waiting
${REVIEW_MODELS.map(m => `
${m.icon}
${m.label}
⏳ Waiting
`).join('')}
Phase 2: Cross-Review Waiting
Phase 3: Consensus Waiting
Phase 4: Devil's Advocate Waiting
Running cost: $0.00
`; } function updateModelStatus(modelId, status, score, confidence) { const key = modelId.replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g, ''); const card = document.getElementById('mc-' + key); const statusEl = document.getElementById('mcs-' + key); const scoreEl = document.getElementById('mcv-' + key); const confEl = document.getElementById('mcc-' + key); const confBar = document.getElementById('mccb-' + key); if (!card) return; card.className = 'model-card ' + status; statusEl.textContent = status === 'running' ? '⟳ Analyzing...' : status === 'done' ? '✓ Done' : status === 'failed' ? '✕ Failed' : '⏳ Waiting'; if (score !== undefined && scoreEl) scoreEl.textContent = score; if (confidence !== undefined && confEl) { confEl.textContent = 'conf: ' + (confidence * 100).toFixed(0) + '%'; } if (confidence !== undefined && confBar) { confBar.style.width = (confidence * 100) + '%'; } document.getElementById('pipe-cost').textContent = 'Running cost: $' + V2_BUILD_COST.toFixed(4); } async function runPivotReview() { await initReviewModels(); // Resolve which models have keys — must run before UI so card count matches showPipelineUI(); const desc = document.getElementById('project-desc').value.trim(); const scorecardJSON = JSON.stringify(V2_SCORECARD, null, 2); const frameworkAnalyses = Object.entries(V2_SCORECARD.framework_analyses || {}).map(([k,v]) => `## ${k.replace(/_/g,' ').toUpperCase()}\n${v}`).join('\n\n'); const pivotPrompt = (modelLabel) => `You are ${modelLabel}, a world-class business strategist. A user described this business idea and received a viability score of ${V2_SCORECARD.composite}/10. ORIGINAL IDEA: ${desc} VIABILITY SCORECARD: ${scorecardJSON} FRAMEWORK ANALYSES: ${frameworkAnalyses} Your task: Propose ONE specific, actionable pivot that would score significantly higher. This should be a FUNDAMENTALLY better business — not just tweaks. Think: different market, different model, different positioning, or a completely reframed value proposition. Return ONLY valid JSON (no markdown, no backticks): { "pivot_description": "2-3 sentence description of the pivoted business idea — specific and actionable", "predicted_composite_score": 8.5, "key_advantages": ["advantage 1", "advantage 2", "advantage 3"], "risks": ["risk 1", "risk 2"], "reasoning": "3-4 paragraph detailed strategic reasoning explaining WHY this pivot is superior. Be specific about market dynamics, competitive positioning, and revenue potential.", "confidence": 0.0 } Be bold. Be specific. No generic advice.`; // ── PHASE 1: Independent proposals (parallel) ───────────────────────── document.getElementById('p1-status').className = 'pipe-phase-status running'; document.getElementById('p1-status').textContent = 'Running...'; REVIEW_MODELS.forEach(m => updateModelStatus(m.id, 'running')); const phase1Results = []; const phase1Promises = REVIEW_MODELS.map(async (m, i) => { try { const raw = await aiRawWithModel(pivotPrompt(m.label), m.id, 3000); const match = raw.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/); if (!match) throw new Error('No JSON'); const proposal = JSON.parse(match[0]); proposal._model = m.label; proposal._modelId = m.id; proposal._index = i; proposal.confidence = parseFloat(proposal.confidence) || 0.7; phase1Results[i] = proposal; updateModelStatus(m.id, 'done', proposal.predicted_composite_score?.toFixed(1), proposal.confidence); return proposal; } catch (e) { phase1Results[i] = { _model: m.label, _modelId: m.id, _index: i, _failed: true, error: e.message }; updateModelStatus(m.id, 'failed'); return null; } }); await Promise.allSettled(phase1Promises); document.getElementById('p1-status').className = 'pipe-phase-status done'; document.getElementById('p1-status').textContent = 'Done'; const validProposals = phase1Results.filter(p => p && !p._failed); if (validProposals.length < 2) { document.getElementById('consensus-result').innerHTML = '

Not enough models responded. Try again or build as-is.

'; return; } // ── PHASE 2: Cross-review (parallel) ────────────────────────────────── document.getElementById('p2-status').className = 'pipe-phase-status running'; document.getElementById('p2-status').textContent = 'Running...'; const proposalList = validProposals.map((p, i) => `PROPOSAL ${i+1} (by ${p._model}):\n${p.pivot_description}\nPredicted score: ${p.predicted_composite_score}\nAdvantages: ${(p.key_advantages||[]).join(', ')}\nRisks: ${(p.risks||[]).join(', ')}\nReasoning: ${p.reasoning}`).join('\n\n---\n\n'); const crossReviewPrompt = (modelLabel, myIndex) => `${REVIEW_MODELS.length} AI models independently analyzed a business idea (original score: ${V2_SCORECARD.composite}/10) and proposed pivots. You are ${modelLabel}. Evaluate ALL proposals objectively. ORIGINAL IDEA: ${desc} PROPOSALS: ${proposalList} Your task: 1. Vote for the BEST proposal (you CANNOT vote for your own — proposal #${myIndex + 1}) 2. Rate each proposal 1-10 3. Suggest a synthesis combining the best elements Return ONLY valid JSON: { "vote": "Model Name you vote for", "ratings": { ${validProposals.map(p => `"${p._model}": { "score": 8, "reasoning": "brief reasoning" }`).join(',\n ')} }, "synthesis": "A combined pivot taking the best of each proposal in 2-3 sentences." }`; const phase2Results = []; REVIEW_MODELS.forEach(m => updateModelStatus(m.id, 'running')); const phase2Promises = REVIEW_MODELS.map(async (m, i) => { try { const raw = await aiRawWithModel(crossReviewPrompt(m.label, i), m.id, 2000); const match = raw.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/); if (!match) throw new Error('No JSON'); const review = JSON.parse(match[0]); review._model = m.label; phase2Results[i] = review; updateModelStatus(m.id, 'done'); return review; } catch (e) { phase2Results[i] = { _model: m.label, _failed: true }; updateModelStatus(m.id, 'failed'); return null; } }); await Promise.allSettled(phase2Promises); // Check consensus strength — iterate if needed (max 3 rounds) let consensusStrength = 0; let iterationCount = 1; const maxIterations = 3; // Count who got the most votes const tempVotes = {}; validProposals.forEach(p => tempVotes[p._model] = 0); phase2Results.filter(r => r && !r._failed).forEach(r => { if (r.vote && tempVotes[r.vote] !== undefined) { const w = REVIEW_MODELS.find(m => m.label === r._model)?.weight || 1; tempVotes[r.vote] += w; } }); const successfulVoters = phase2Results.filter(r => r && !r._failed); const totalWeight = successfulVoters.reduce((s, r) => { const m = REVIEW_MODELS.find(model => model.label === r._model); return s + (m?.weight || 1); }, 0) || 1; // avoid division by zero const maxVoteWeight = Math.max(...Object.values(tempVotes)); consensusStrength = maxVoteWeight / totalWeight; while (consensusStrength < 0.6 && iterationCount < maxIterations) { iterationCount++; document.getElementById('p2-status').textContent = `Round ${iterationCount}/${maxIterations} — consensus: ${(consensusStrength * 100).toFixed(0)}%`; // Re-run cross-review with previous results as context const prevContext = phase2Results.filter(r => r && !r._failed).map(r => `${r._model} voted for ${r.vote}. Synthesis: ${r.synthesis || 'none'}`).join('\n'); const iterPromises = REVIEW_MODELS.map(async (m, i) => { try { const raw = await aiRawWithModel( crossReviewPrompt(m.label, i) + `\n\nPREVIOUS ROUND RESULTS:\n${prevContext}\n\nReconsider your vote based on the group's reasoning. You may change your vote if persuaded.`, m.id, 2000 ); const match = raw.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/); if (!match) throw new Error('No JSON'); const review = JSON.parse(match[0]); review._model = m.label; phase2Results[i] = review; return review; } catch { return phase2Results[i]; } }); await Promise.allSettled(iterPromises); // Recompute consensus Object.keys(tempVotes).forEach(k => tempVotes[k] = 0); phase2Results.filter(r => r && !r._failed).forEach(r => { if (r.vote && tempVotes[r.vote] !== undefined) { const w = REVIEW_MODELS.find(m => m.label === r._model)?.weight || 1; tempVotes[r.vote] += w; } }); consensusStrength = Math.max(...Object.values(tempVotes)) / (phase2Results.filter(r => r && !r._failed).reduce((s, r) => { const m = REVIEW_MODELS.find(model => model.label === r._model); return s + (m?.weight || 1); }, 0) || 1); } document.getElementById('p2-status').className = 'pipe-phase-status done'; document.getElementById('p2-status').textContent = `Done (${iterationCount} round${iterationCount > 1 ? 's' : ''}, ${(consensusStrength * 100).toFixed(0)}% consensus)`; // ── PHASE 3: Consensus aggregation (client-side) ────────────────────── document.getElementById('p3-status').className = 'pipe-phase-status running'; document.getElementById('p3-status').textContent = 'Aggregating...'; const votes = {}; const scores = {}; const syntheses = []; validProposals.forEach(p => { votes[p._model] = 0; scores[p._model] = []; }); phase2Results.filter(r => r && !r._failed).forEach(review => { if (review.vote && votes[review.vote] !== undefined) { const reviewerModel = REVIEW_MODELS.find(m => m.label === review._model); const modelConfidence = phase1Results.find(p => p?._model === review._model)?.confidence || 0.7; votes[review.vote] += (reviewerModel?.weight || 1.0) * modelConfidence; } if (review.ratings) { Object.entries(review.ratings).forEach(([model, rating]) => { if (scores[model]) scores[model].push(typeof rating === 'object' ? rating.score : rating); }); } if (review.synthesis) syntheses.push(review.synthesis); }); // Determine winner const ranked = validProposals.map(p => ({ ...p, votes: votes[p._model] || 0, avgScore: scores[p._model]?.length ? (scores[p._model].reduce((a,b) => a+b, 0) / scores[p._model].length) : 0 })).sort((a, b) => b.votes - a.votes || b.avgScore - a.avgScore); const winner = ranked[0]; const runnerUp = ranked[1]; // Show votes on model cards validProposals.forEach(p => { const vtEl = document.getElementById('mcvt-' + p._modelId.replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g, '')); if (vtEl) vtEl.textContent = `${(votes[p._model] || 0).toFixed(1)} pts`; }); // Highlight winner if (winner) { const winCard = document.getElementById('mc-' + winner._modelId.replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g, '')); if (winCard) winCard.classList.add('winner'); } document.getElementById('p3-status').className = 'pipe-phase-status done'; document.getElementById('p3-status').textContent = 'Done'; // ── PHASE 4: Devil's Advocate ─────────────────────────────────────── document.getElementById('p4-status').className = 'pipe-phase-status running'; document.getElementById('p4-status').textContent = 'Attacking...'; let devilsCritique = ''; try { devilsCritique = await aiRawWithModel( `You are a ruthless venture capital partner who has watched 10,000 startups fail. You have ZERO tolerance for optimism bias. Your job: DESTROY this business idea. Find every fatal flaw. THE PROPOSED BUSINESS: ${winner?.pivot_description || desc} PREDICTED SCORE: ${winner?.predicted_composite_score || V2_SCORECARD.composite}/10 ADVANTAGES CLAIMED: ${(winner?.key_advantages || []).join(', ')} Your task: Write a devastating critique. Cover: 1. Why the market analysis is WRONG 2. Why the competitive moat will FAIL 3. Why the revenue projections are FANTASY 4. What the founders are NOT seeing 5. The ONE thing that will kill this business Be specific. Use numbers. Reference real market dynamics. No encouragement. Pure destruction. Return 4-5 paragraphs of brutal, specific critique.`, 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile', 2000 ); } catch { devilsCritique = 'Devil\'s advocate analysis unavailable.'; } document.getElementById('p4-status').className = 'pipe-phase-status done'; document.getElementById('p4-status').textContent = 'Done'; // ── Render consensus result ─────────────────────────────────────────── const bestSynthesis = syntheses[0] || winner?.pivot_description || ''; // Store state for iterative refinement window._refineState = { currentIdea: winner?.pivot_description || desc, currentCritique: devilsCritique, originalIdea: desc, scorecard: V2_SCORECARD, rounds: [], }; document.getElementById('consensus-result').innerHTML = `
🏆 Consensus Recommendation
${escapeHtml(winner?.pivot_description || 'No consensus reached')}
Proposed by: ${escapeHtml(winner?._model)}
Votes: ${winner?.votes || 0} / ${phase2Results.filter(r => r && !r._failed).length}
Avg rating: ${winner?.avgScore?.toFixed(1) || 'N/A'} / 10
Predicted score: ${winner?.predicted_composite_score?.toFixed(1) || 'N/A'} / 10
${winner?.key_advantages ? `
Key Advantages:
${winner.key_advantages.map(a => `
✓ ${escapeHtml(a)}
`).join('')}
` : ''} ${winner?.risks ? `
Risks:
${winner.risks.map(r => `
⚠ ${escapeHtml(r)}
`).join('')}
` : ''} ${winner?.reasoning ? `
Full reasoning ▼

${escapeHtml(winner.reasoning)}

` : ''} ${syntheses.length ? `
Model syntheses ▼${syntheses.map((s,i) => `

${escapeHtml(s)}

`).join('')}
` : ''}
${V2_SCORECARD.composite.toFixed(1)} → ${winner?.predicted_composite_score?.toFixed(1) || '?'} predicted improvement
${devilsCritique ? `
😈 Devil's Advocate
${escapeHtml(devilsCritique)}
Powered by Claude Opus 4 — the harshest critic available
Each round: AI addresses the critique → Devil's Advocate attacks again → repeat until bulletproof
` : ''} ${runnerUp ? `
Runner-up: ${runnerUp._model} (${runnerUp.votes} votes, ${runnerUp.avgScore?.toFixed(1)}/10 avg) ▼

${runnerUp.pivot_description}

${runnerUp.reasoning || ''}

` : ''} `; } async function acceptPivot(pivotDesc) { document.getElementById('project-desc').value = pivotDesc; // Offer choice: re-score or skip to build const pipeline = document.getElementById('pipeline-screen'); const consensus = document.getElementById('consensus-result'); if (consensus) { consensus.innerHTML = `
✓ Pivot accepted

"${pivotDesc.slice(0, 150)}${pivotDesc.length > 150 ? '...' : ''}"

Scoring is always free. Your build credit is only used when you click Build.

`; } } async function reScorePivot() { const pivotDesc = document.getElementById('project-desc').value.trim(); INFERRED = null; V2_SCORECARD = null; document.getElementById('pipeline-screen').style.display = 'none'; document.getElementById('scorecard-wrap').style.display = 'none'; document.getElementById('sc-actions').style.display = 'grid'; document.getElementById('framework-screen').style.display = 'none'; document.getElementById('input-screen').style.display = 'block'; document.getElementById('refinement-results').style.display = 'none'; document.getElementById('preview').style.display = 'none'; document.getElementById('launch-btn').textContent = 'Re-analyzing pivoted idea...'; document.getElementById('launch-btn').disabled = true; dynastyRefreshCkptBanner(); await inferConfig(pivotDesc); } function skipToBuild() { // Use the pivoted description but skip re-scoring — go straight to build document.getElementById('pipeline-screen').style.display = 'none'; document.getElementById('scorecard-wrap').style.display = 'none'; document.getElementById('framework-screen').style.display = 'none'; document.getElementById('input-screen').style.display = 'none'; document.getElementById('refinement-results').style.display = 'none'; startBuild(); } function cancelPivot() { // Return to scorecard without changing anything document.getElementById('pipeline-screen').style.display = 'none'; const sc = document.getElementById('scorecard-wrap'); if (sc) sc.style.display = 'block'; document.getElementById('sc-actions').style.display = 'grid'; } function modifyPivot(pivotDesc) { const cr = document.getElementById('consensus-result'); cr.innerHTML = `

Modify the pivot before accepting:

`; } // ── Iterative Adversarial Refinement Engine ────────────────────────────────── // Takes Devil's Advocate critique → refines idea → attacks again → repeat // Each round the idea gets sharper until the Devil can't find fatal flaws. async function refineWithDevil(maxRounds = 3) { const state = window._refineState; if (!state) return; const log = document.getElementById('refine-log'); const controls = document.getElementById('refine-controls'); if (controls) controls.style.display = 'none'; log.style.display = 'block'; log.innerHTML = '
🔄 Adversarial Refinement Loop
'; let currentIdea = state.currentIdea; let currentCritique = state.currentCritique; let allRounds = [...(state.rounds || [])]; for (let round = 1; round <= maxRounds; round++) { // ── Step A: Refine the idea based on the critique ────────────────── const roundEl = document.createElement('div'); roundEl.style.cssText = 'border:1px solid var(--bdr);border-radius:var(--rl);padding:16px;margin-bottom:12px;background:var(--panel)'; roundEl.innerHTML = `
Round ${round}/${maxRounds} Refining idea...
`; log.appendChild(roundEl); let refinedIdea = ''; try { const refineRaw = await aiRawWithModel( `You are a world-class business strategist. A business idea was brutally critiqued. Your job: ADDRESS EVERY SINGLE CRITICISM and produce a significantly improved version. CURRENT IDEA: ${currentIdea} DEVIL'S ADVOCATE CRITIQUE: ${currentCritique} ORIGINAL IDEA (for context): ${state.originalIdea} ORIGINAL SCORE: ${state.scorecard?.composite || 'N/A'}/10 Your task: 1. For EACH specific criticism, explain how the refined idea addresses or neutralizes it 2. Produce a refined business description that is fundamentally stronger 3. Be specific — include pricing, target market, go-to-market, and competitive positioning 4. Don't just tweak — if the critique reveals a fatal flaw, pivot around it Return ONLY valid JSON: { "refined_idea": "3-5 sentence refined business description — specific, actionable, addresses every critique", "critiques_addressed": [ {"critique": "Brief summary of original critique point", "response": "How the refined idea addresses this"}, ...for each major critique ], "key_changes": ["Change 1", "Change 2", "Change 3"], "predicted_score": 8.5, "confidence": "high/medium/low" }`, 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', 3000 ); const match = refineRaw.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/); if (!match) throw new Error('No JSON in refinement response'); const refined = JSON.parse(match[0]); refinedIdea = refined.refined_idea || currentIdea; const addressedHtml = (refined.critiques_addressed || []).map(c => `
❌ ${escapeHtml(c.critique)}
✓ ${escapeHtml(c.response)}
` ).join(''); const changesHtml = (refined.key_changes || []).map(c => `${escapeHtml(c)}` ).join(' '); document.getElementById(`refine-content-${round}`).innerHTML = `
✅ Refined Idea
${escapeHtml(refinedIdea)}
Changes: ${changesHtml}
Critiques addressed (${(refined.critiques_addressed||[]).length}) ▼ ${addressedHtml}
Predicted: ${refined.predicted_score}/10 · Confidence: ${refined.confidence || 'medium'}
`; document.getElementById(`refine-status-${round}`).textContent = 'Attacking refined idea...'; document.getElementById(`refine-status-${round}`).style.color = 'var(--red)'; } catch (e) { document.getElementById(`refine-content-${round}`).innerHTML = `
Refinement failed: ${escapeHtml(e.message)}
`; document.getElementById(`refine-status-${round}`).textContent = 'Failed'; break; } // ── Step B: Devil's Advocate attacks the refined idea ──────────────── let newCritique = ''; try { newCritique = await aiRawWithModel( `You are a ruthless VC partner. Round ${round} of adversarial refinement. The founder has addressed your previous criticisms and refined their idea. Your job: find NEW fatal flaws. Do NOT repeat criticisms that have been addressed. REFINED IDEA (round ${round}): ${refinedIdea} PREVIOUS CRITIQUE (already addressed — do NOT repeat these): ${currentCritique} ORIGINAL IDEA: ${state.originalIdea} Rules: - Only raise NEW concerns not covered by your previous critique - If the refinement genuinely fixed a problem, acknowledge it briefly then move on - Focus on second-order effects, scaling challenges, competitive responses, and market timing - If the idea is now genuinely strong, say so — but still find the 1-2 remaining vulnerabilities - Be specific with numbers, market references, and real competitive dynamics ${round >= maxRounds ? 'This is the FINAL round. Give your honest final assessment: is this business viable? What is the single biggest remaining risk?' : ''} Return 3-4 paragraphs. If the idea has become genuinely strong, your critique should be shorter and more targeted.`, 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile', 2000 ); } catch { newCritique = 'Devil\'s advocate unavailable for this round.'; } // Append critique to round display const critiqueEl = document.createElement('div'); critiqueEl.style.cssText = 'margin-top:10px;padding:10px;background:rgba(229,83,75,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(229,83,75,0.15);border-radius:8px'; critiqueEl.innerHTML = `
😈 Counter-Attack (Round ${round})
${escapeHtml(newCritique)}
`; document.getElementById(`refine-content-${round}`).appendChild(critiqueEl); document.getElementById(`refine-status-${round}`).textContent = '✓ Complete'; document.getElementById(`refine-status-${round}`).style.color = 'var(--grn)'; // Save round data allRounds.push({ round, refinedIdea, critique: newCritique }); currentIdea = refinedIdea; currentCritique = newCritique; } // ── Final: Show accept button with the fully refined idea ──────────────── window._refineState.currentIdea = currentIdea; window._refineState.currentCritique = currentCritique; window._refineState.rounds = allRounds; const finalEl = document.createElement('div'); finalEl.style.cssText = 'margin-top:16px;padding:16px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(74,222,128,0.06),rgba(201,168,76,0.06));border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.3);border-radius:var(--rl)'; finalEl.innerHTML = `
🏆 Final Refined Idea (after ${allRounds.length} adversarial rounds)
${currentIdea}
`; log.appendChild(finalEl); } async function startBuild() { // ── Payment verification: require paid session or admin key ──────────── const isAdmin = !!localStorage.getItem('dynasty_admin_token'); const hasPaid = !!localStorage.getItem('dynasty_paid_session'); if (!isAdmin && !hasPaid) { // Free tier can score but not build — show upgrade prompt const action = confirm('Free tier includes viability scoring only.\n\nUpgrade to Foundation Automation Capacity ($1,997) to generate strategy docs + deployed application.\n\nClick OK to view plans.'); if (action) { window.location.href = '/#pricing'; } return; } if (!isAdmin && getUserTier() === 'blueprint') { const action = confirm('Your Diagnostic + Execution Blueprint is complete.\n\nTo run full generation and deployment, upgrade to Foundation ($1,997). If purchased within 14 days, your $297 blueprint fee is credited at checkout.\n\nClick OK to continue to paid plans.'); if (action) { startCheckout('foundation'); } return; } if (!isAdmin && getUserTier() === 'scoring_pro') { const action = confirm('Scoring Pro unlocks ongoing scoring access, not full build execution.\n\nTo run full generation and deployment, upgrade to Foundation ($1,997).\n\nClick OK to continue to paid plans.'); if (action) { startCheckout('foundation'); } return; } // ── Build gating: check if user has builds remaining ──────────── if (getBuildsRemaining() <= 0) { const action = confirm('You\'ve used your build credit. Purchase Foundation Automation Capacity for $1,997?\n\nClick OK to go to checkout, or Cancel to return.'); if (action) { startCheckout('foundation'); return; } else return; } const desc = document.getElementById('project-desc').value.trim(); saveBuildProfileToStorage(); BUILD_START_TIME = Date.now(); BUILD_COMPACTIONS = []; PREFLIGHT_APPROVED = false; // Warn user before closing tab during build window._buildInProgress = true; window.onbeforeunload = () => window._buildInProgress ? 'Build in progress — closing will lose all generated files.' : null; // Start elapsed timer window._buildFileCount = 0; window._buildWordCount = 0; window._buildTimerInterval = setInterval(() => { const sec = Math.floor((Date.now() - BUILD_START_TIME) / 1000); const min = Math.floor(sec / 60); const s = sec % 60; const el = document.getElementById('elapsed-timer'); if (el) el.textContent = `${min}:${s.toString().padStart(2, '0')}`; // Update file counter from live tracker const fc = document.getElementById('files-counter'); if (fc) fc.textContent = (window._buildFileCount || 0).toLocaleString(); // Update word counter from live tracker const wc = document.getElementById('words-counter'); if (wc) wc.textContent = (window._buildWordCount || 0).toLocaleString(); }, 1000); EXISTING_CLAUDE_MD = null; PLANNING_OUTPUT = null; // ── Preflight Review (Improvement 7) ──────────────────────────────────── const approved = await runPreflight(INFERRED, []); if (!approved) return; // User cancelled PREFLIGHT_APPROVED = true; // ── CLAUDE.md Read-Back (Improvement 6) ───────────────────────────────── if (flagEnabled('claude_md_readback') && INFERRED?.repo) { EXISTING_CLAUDE_MD = await checkExistingProject(INFERRED.repo); if (EXISTING_CLAUDE_MD) { console.log(`Found existing CLAUDE.md for ${INFERRED.repo} (${EXISTING_CLAUDE_MD.length} chars) — will use for iterative context`); } } // ── Planning Cycles — give user the choice to skip ───────────────────── if (PLANNING_ENABLED && flagEnabled('context_compaction')) { // Show choice: plan or build directly const configScreen = document.getElementById('config-screen'); let skipDiv = document.getElementById('plan-skip-choice'); if (!skipDiv) { skipDiv = document.createElement('div'); skipDiv.id = 'plan-skip-choice'; skipDiv.style.cssText = 'margin-top:16px;padding:16px;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--bdr);border-radius:12px;text-align:center'; skipDiv.innerHTML = `
The planning phase creates an architecture blueprint, design contract, and build plan before generating code. It improves output quality but takes 2-3 minutes.
`; configScreen.appendChild(skipDiv); } return; // Wait for user to click } // If planning is disabled, go straight to build proceedToBuild(desc); } async function runPlanAfterChoice() { const desc = document.getElementById('project-desc').value.trim(); document.getElementById('config-screen').style.display = 'none'; await runPlanningCycles(desc, INFERRED); } async function skipPlanAndBuildDirect() { const desc = document.getElementById('project-desc').value.trim(); document.getElementById('config-screen').style.display = 'none'; PLANNING_ENABLED = false; await proceedToBuild(desc); } // Called by "Execute Build Plan" button after planning completes async function executeBuildFromPlan() { const desc = document.getElementById('project-desc').value.trim(); document.getElementById('planning-screen').style.display = 'none'; await proceedToBuild(desc); } // Called by "Skip to raw build" button async function skipPlanAndBuild() { const desc = document.getElementById('project-desc').value.trim(); BUILD_COMPACTIONS = []; // Clear any partial planning PLANNING_OUTPUT = null; document.getElementById('planning-screen').style.display = 'none'; await proceedToBuild(desc); } // The actual build execution (previously the body of startBuild) async function proceedToBuild(desc, opts) { opts = opts || {}; document.getElementById('prog-screen').style.display = 'block'; document.getElementById('prog-title').textContent = `Building ${INFERRED.name}…`; try { if (getBuildProfile().archetype === 'demo_express') { window._V4_DEMO_T0 = Date.now(); window._v4Phase8DoneAt = null; } } catch {} V2_BUILD_COST = 0; if (!opts.resume) { PRGS = []; renderProg(); } const errors = []; try { await build(desc, INFERRED, opts.resume ? { resume: true } : undefined); } catch (e) { errors.push(e.message); } finally { dynastyStopCheckpointLoop(); try { window._buildInProgress = false; window.onbeforeunload = null; window.__dynastySkipBuildCredit = false; } catch {} if (!errors.length) await dynastyClearBuildCheckpoint(); } // ── Record to Memory (Improvement 5) ──────────────────────────────────── await recordBuild(INFERRED, { files: PRGS.filter(p => p.s === 'ok').map(p => p.id) }, errors); // ── Telegram Build Notification ──────────────────────────────────────── const buildDur = ((Date.now() - BUILD_START_TIME) / 1000).toFixed(0); const okCount = PRGS.filter(p => p.s === 'ok').length; const errCount = errors.length; await sendTelegramNotification( `🏗 Dynasty Build Complete\n\n` + `📦 ${INFERRED.name}\n` + `✅ ${okCount} phases completed${errCount ? ` · ❌ ${errCount} errors` : ''}\n` + `💰 $${V2_BUILD_COST.toFixed(4)} · ⏱ ${buildDur}s\n` + `🔗 https://github.com/${ORG}/${INFERRED.repo}\n` + `🌐 https://${INFERRED.repo}.vercel.app` ); } // ── INPUT METHODS ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── // 6 ways to input ideas beyond typing // ── 1. Voice Input (Web Speech API — free, browser-native) ────────────────── let voiceRecognition = null; let voiceActive = false; function setInputStatus(id, message, show = true) { const el = document.getElementById(id); if (!el) return; el.textContent = message || ''; el.style.display = show ? 'block' : 'none'; } function toggleVoiceInput() { if (!('webkitSpeechRecognition' in window) && !('SpeechRecognition' in window)) { alert('Voice input is not supported in this browser. Try Chrome or Edge.'); return; } if (voiceActive) { stopVoice(); return; } const SpeechRecognition = window.SpeechRecognition || window.webkitSpeechRecognition; voiceRecognition = new SpeechRecognition(); voiceRecognition.continuous = true; voiceRecognition.interimResults = true; voiceRecognition.lang = 'en-US'; const btn = document.getElementById('im-voice'); const status = document.getElementById('im-voice-status'); const textarea = document.getElementById('project-desc'); const startText = textarea.value; voiceRecognition.onstart = () => { voiceActive = true; btn.classList.add('recording'); btn.innerHTML = '⏹ Stop'; status.style.display = 'block'; status.textContent = '🔴 Listening... speak your idea'; }; voiceRecognition.onresult = (e) => { let final = '', interim = ''; for (let i = 0; i < e.results.length; i++) { if (e.results[i].isFinal) final += e.results[i][0].transcript + ' '; else interim += e.results[i][0].transcript; } textarea.value = (startText ? startText + ' ' : '') + final + interim; status.textContent = `🔴 Listening... ${final.length > 0 ? final.split(' ').length + ' words captured' : 'speak your idea'}`; onDescInput(); }; voiceRecognition.onerror = (e) => { status.textContent = `Error: ${e.error}`; stopVoice(); }; voiceRecognition.onend = () => { if (voiceActive) voiceRecognition.start(); }; try { voiceRecognition.start(); } catch (e) { setInputStatus('im-voice-status', 'Voice input could not start. Check microphone permission and try again.'); stopVoice(); } } function stopVoice() { voiceActive = false; if (voiceRecognition) voiceRecognition.stop(); const btn = document.getElementById('im-voice'); btn.classList.remove('recording'); btn.innerHTML = '🎤 Voice'; document.getElementById('im-voice-status').textContent = '✓ Voice input complete'; setTimeout(() => { document.getElementById('im-voice-status').style.display = 'none'; }, 3000); onDescInput(); } // ── 2. URL/Competitor Analysis ─────────────────────────────────────────────── async function analyzeURL() { const url = document.getElementById('im-url-input').value.trim(); if (!url) return; const status = document.getElementById('im-url-status'); status.textContent = '⏳ Fetching and analyzing...'; try { // Fetch the page content via our AI proxy const raw = await aiRaw(`Analyze this website URL and extract the business model for someone who wants to build something similar but better. URL: ${url} Based on the URL (and your knowledge of common business patterns), describe: 1. What the business does (2-3 sentences) 2. Who their customers are 3. Their likely revenue model 4. Their key features 5. Their weaknesses or gaps Then write a 3-4 sentence project description for a BETTER version of this business, incorporating improvements that address their weaknesses. Write it as if a founder is describing their new project. Return ONLY the project description paragraph — no headers, no analysis, just the improved business idea.`, 1500); if (raw) { document.getElementById('project-desc').value = raw; status.textContent = `✓ Analyzed — idea generated from ${url}`; onDescInput(); } } catch (e) { status.textContent = `Error: ${e.message}`; } } // ── 3. Image/Screenshot Upload (Claude Vision) ────────────────────────────── async function handleImageUpload(file) { if (!file) return; const status = document.getElementById('im-image-status') || document.getElementById('im-camera-status'); if (status) status.textContent = `⏳ Analyzing ${file.name}...`; try { const base64 = await fileToBase64(file); const mediaType = file.type || 'image/png'; const r = await fetch('/api/ai', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 1500, ...getAiAuthPayload(), usage_context: isFreeTier() ? 'free_scoring' : 'standard', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: [ { type: 'image', source: { type: 'base64', media_type: mediaType, data: base64 } }, { type: 'text', text: `This is a screenshot, sketch, or whiteboard photo of a business idea or product concept. Extract the business idea from this image and write a clear 3-5 sentence project description suitable for a project generator. Include: what it does, who it's for, and how it makes money. If it's a rough sketch, interpret the intent. Write ONLY the project description.` } ] }] }) }); const d = await r.json(); const text = d.content?.find(b => b.type === 'text')?.text || ''; if (text) { document.getElementById('project-desc').value = text; status.textContent = `✓ Extracted idea from ${file.name}`; onDescInput(); } else { status.textContent = 'Could not extract idea from image'; } } catch (e) { status.textContent = `Error: ${e.message}`; } } // ── 3a. Live Camera Capture via MediaStream API ──────────────────────────── let _camStream = null, _camFacing = 'environment'; async function openCamera(facing) { _camFacing = facing || 'environment'; const container = document.getElementById('cam-container'); const buttons = document.getElementById('cam-buttons'); const status = document.getElementById('im-camera-status'); try { if (!navigator.mediaDevices || !navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia) { if (status) status.textContent = 'Camera is not available in this browser. Use Upload photo instead.'; return; } if (_camStream) _camStream.getTracks().forEach(t => t.stop()); _camStream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ video: { facingMode: _camFacing, width: { ideal: 1920 }, height: { ideal: 1080 } } }); document.getElementById('cam-preview').srcObject = _camStream; container.style.display = 'block'; buttons.style.display = 'none'; } catch (e) { if (status) status.textContent = 'Camera access denied. Use the Upload option instead.'; } } function flipCamera() { _camFacing = _camFacing === 'environment' ? 'user' : 'environment'; openCamera(_camFacing); } function stopCamera() { if (_camStream) { _camStream.getTracks().forEach(t => t.stop()); _camStream = null; } document.getElementById('cam-preview').srcObject = null; document.getElementById('cam-container').style.display = 'none'; document.getElementById('cam-buttons').style.display = 'flex'; } async function capturePhoto() { const video = document.getElementById('cam-preview'); const canvas = document.getElementById('cam-canvas'); canvas.width = video.videoWidth || 1920; canvas.height = video.videoHeight || 1080; canvas.getContext('2d').drawImage(video, 0, 0); const dataUrl = canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg', 0.9); stopCamera(); // Convert to File and process through handleImageUpload const resp = await fetch(dataUrl); const blob = await resp.blob(); const file = new File([blob], 'camera-capture.jpg', { type: 'image/jpeg' }); handleImageUpload(file); } // ── 3b. Live Video Recording via MediaStream API ─────────────────────────── let _vidStream = null, _vidRecorder = null, _vidChunks = [], _vidRecording = false, _vidTimer = null, _vidSeconds = 0; let _vidSpeechRecognition = null, _vidSpeechActive = false, _vidTranscriptChunks = []; function startVideoSpeechCapture() { const SpeechRecognition = window.SpeechRecognition || window.webkitSpeechRecognition; if (!SpeechRecognition) return false; try { _vidSpeechRecognition = new SpeechRecognition(); _vidSpeechRecognition.continuous = true; _vidSpeechRecognition.interimResults = true; _vidSpeechRecognition.lang = 'en-US'; _vidSpeechRecognition.onstart = () => { _vidSpeechActive = true; }; _vidSpeechRecognition.onresult = (e) => { let final = ''; for (let i = 0; i < e.results.length; i++) { if (e.results[i].isFinal) final += e.results[i][0].transcript + ' '; } if (final.trim()) _vidTranscriptChunks.push(final.trim()); }; _vidSpeechRecognition.onerror = () => {}; _vidSpeechRecognition.onend = () => { // Keep listening while recording is active. if (_vidSpeechActive && _vidRecording) { try { _vidSpeechRecognition.start(); } catch {} } }; _vidSpeechRecognition.start(); return true; } catch { return false; } } function stopVideoSpeechCapture() { _vidSpeechActive = false; if (_vidSpeechRecognition) { try { _vidSpeechRecognition.stop(); } catch {} } } async function startVideoPreview() { const container = document.getElementById('vid-rec-container'); const buttons = document.getElementById('vid-buttons'); const status = document.getElementById('im-video-status'); try { if (!navigator.mediaDevices || !navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia) { if (status) status.textContent = 'Video capture is not available in this browser. Use Upload video instead.'; return; } _vidStream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ video: { facingMode: 'environment', width: { ideal: 1280 }, height: { ideal: 720 } }, audio: true }); document.getElementById('vid-preview').srcObject = _vidStream; container.style.display = 'block'; buttons.style.display = 'none'; document.getElementById('vid-rec-btn').textContent = '⏺ Start Recording'; document.getElementById('vid-rec-btn').style.background = '#E53E3B'; document.getElementById('vid-rec-time').textContent = 'Camera ready — click Start Recording'; } catch (e) { if (status) status.textContent = 'Camera access denied. Try the Upload option instead.'; } } function stopVideoPreview() { stopVideoSpeechCapture(); if (_vidStream) { _vidStream.getTracks().forEach(t => t.stop()); _vidStream = null; } if (_vidTimer) { clearInterval(_vidTimer); _vidTimer = null; } document.getElementById('vid-preview').srcObject = null; document.getElementById('vid-rec-container').style.display = 'none'; document.getElementById('vid-buttons').style.display = 'flex'; _vidRecording = false; _vidSeconds = 0; } function toggleVideoRecording() { const status = document.getElementById('im-video-status'); if (!_vidStream) { if (status) status.textContent = 'Camera preview is not active. Click "Record video" first.'; return; } if (typeof MediaRecorder === 'undefined') { if (status) status.textContent = 'Recording is not supported in this browser. Use Upload video instead.'; return; } if (!_vidRecording) { // Start recording _vidChunks = []; _vidTranscriptChunks = []; const mimeType = MediaRecorder.isTypeSupported('video/webm;codecs=vp9,opus') ? 'video/webm;codecs=vp9,opus' : MediaRecorder.isTypeSupported('video/webm;codecs=vp8,opus') ? 'video/webm;codecs=vp8,opus' : 'video/webm'; try { _vidRecorder = new MediaRecorder(_vidStream, { mimeType }); } catch (e) { if (status) status.textContent = 'Could not start recording. Try Upload video instead.'; return; } _vidRecorder.ondataavailable = (e) => { if (e.data.size > 0) _vidChunks.push(e.data); }; _vidRecorder.onstop = () => { const blob = new Blob(_vidChunks, { type: 'video/webm' }); const file = new File([blob], 'recording.webm', { type: 'video/webm' }); const transcript = _vidTranscriptChunks.join(' ').trim(); stopVideoPreview(); handleVideoUpload(file, { transcript }); }; _vidRecorder.start(1000); _vidRecording = true; const speechStarted = startVideoSpeechCapture(); _vidSeconds = 0; document.getElementById('vid-rec-btn').textContent = '⏹ Stop Recording'; document.getElementById('vid-rec-btn').style.background = '#333'; if (status) { status.textContent = speechStarted ? 'Recording video + microphone transcript...' : 'Recording video (speech transcript not supported in this browser)...'; } _vidTimer = setInterval(() => { _vidSeconds++; document.getElementById('vid-rec-time').textContent = `Recording: ${Math.floor(_vidSeconds/60)}:${(_vidSeconds%60).toString().padStart(2,'0')} — max 60s`; if (_vidSeconds >= 60) { _vidRecorder.stop(); clearInterval(_vidTimer); } }, 1000); } else { // Stop recording stopVideoSpeechCapture(); if (_vidRecorder && _vidRecorder.state === 'recording') _vidRecorder.stop(); if (_vidTimer) { clearInterval(_vidTimer); _vidTimer = null; } _vidRecording = false; } } // ── 3c. Video Upload (extract frame → AI analysis) ───────────────────────── async function handleVideoUpload(file, options = {}) { if (!file) return; let transcript = (options.transcript || '').trim(); const status = document.getElementById('im-video-status') || document.getElementById('im-image-status'); if (file.size > 50 * 1024 * 1024) { status.textContent = 'Video too large (max 50MB). Try a shorter clip.'; return; } status.textContent = `⏳ Processing ${file.name} (${(file.size / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(1)}MB)...`; try { if (!transcript) { try { status.textContent = '⏳ Extracting speech from video audio...'; const audioBase64 = await fileToBase64(file); const tr = await fetch('/api/ai', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ action: 'transcribe_audio', audio_base64: audioBase64, mime_type: file.type || 'video/webm', ...getAiAuthPayload(), usage_context: 'free_scoring' }) }); const trData = await tr.json(); if (tr.ok && trData?.text) transcript = String(trData.text).trim(); } catch {} } const videoUrl = URL.createObjectURL(file); const video = document.createElement('video'); video.src = videoUrl; video.muted = true; video.preload = 'metadata'; video.playsInline = true; await new Promise((resolve, reject) => { const timer = setTimeout(() => reject(new Error('Video load timeout')), 12000); video.onloadedmetadata = () => { clearTimeout(timer); resolve(); }; video.onerror = () => reject(new Error('Could not read video metadata')); video.load(); }); const duration = Number.isFinite(video.duration) ? video.duration : 0; const targetTime = duration > 1 ? Math.min(Math.max(duration * 0.35, 0.2), Math.max(duration - 0.2, 0.2)) : 0.1; if (duration > 0.1) { await new Promise((resolve, reject) => { const timer = setTimeout(() => reject(new Error('Video seek timeout')), 8000); video.onseeked = () => { clearTimeout(timer); resolve(); }; video.onerror = () => reject(new Error('Could not seek video frame')); video.currentTime = targetTime; }); } // Capture a frame from the video const canvas = document.createElement('canvas'); canvas.width = video.videoWidth || 1280; canvas.height = video.videoHeight || 720; canvas.getContext('2d').drawImage(video, 0, 0); const frameDataUrl = canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg', 0.8); const frameBase64 = frameDataUrl.split(',')[1]; URL.revokeObjectURL(videoUrl); status.textContent = transcript ? '⏳ AI is analyzing your video + transcript...' : '⏳ AI is analyzing the video frame...'; const transcriptContext = transcript ? `\n\nTranscript captured from your speech in the video:\n${transcript}\n\nUse both the visual frame and transcript.` : ''; const r = await fetch('/api/ai', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 2000, ...getAiAuthPayload(), usage_context: isFreeTier() ? 'free_scoring' : 'standard', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: [ { type: 'image', source: { type: 'base64', media_type: 'image/jpeg', data: frameBase64 } }, { type: 'text', text: `This is a frame captured from a video where someone is showing their business concept — it might show a storefront, product, workspace, or service in action. Analyze what you see and write a clear 3-5 sentence business description suitable for a project generator. Include: what the business does, who it serves, the type of service/product, and a revenue model. If the image shows a physical location, describe what kind of business it is.${transcriptContext} Write ONLY the project description.` } ] }] }) }); const d = await r.json(); if (!r.ok) throw new Error(d?.error || `AI analysis failed (${r.status})`); const text = d.content?.find(b => b.type === 'text')?.text || ''; if (text) { document.getElementById('project-desc').value = text; status.textContent = `✓ Extracted business idea from video`; onDescInput(); } else { if (transcript.length > 20) { const summary = await aiRaw(`Rewrite this transcript into a clear 3-5 sentence project description for a business builder. Include what it does, who it serves, and revenue model. Return only the description.\n\nTranscript:\n${transcript}`, 800); if (summary) { document.getElementById('project-desc').value = summary; status.textContent = '✓ Extracted business idea from your video speech'; onDescInput(); return; } } status.textContent = 'Could not extract idea from video. Try a brighter shot, shorter clip, or Voice input.'; } } catch (e) { status.textContent = `Error: ${e.message}. Try recording a shorter clip or using Voice input.`; } } // ── 4. Document Upload (PDF/TXT extraction) ───────────────────────────────── async function handleDocUpload(file) { if (!file) return; const status = document.getElementById('im-doc-status'); status.textContent = `⏳ Reading ${file.name}...`; try { let text = ''; if (file.type === 'application/pdf') { // For PDFs, send as base64 to Claude const base64 = await fileToBase64(file); const r = await fetch('/api/ai', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 1500, ...getAiAuthPayload(), usage_context: isFreeTier() ? 'free_scoring' : 'standard', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: [ { type: 'document', source: { type: 'base64', media_type: 'application/pdf', data: base64 } }, { type: 'text', text: `This is a business plan, pitch deck, or research document. Extract the core business idea and write a clear 3-5 sentence project description suitable for a project generator. Include: what it does, who it's for, how it makes money, and what technology stack would be appropriate. Write ONLY the project description.` } ] }] }) }); const d = await r.json(); text = d.content?.find(b => b.type === 'text')?.text || ''; } else { // For text files, read directly then summarize const rawText = await file.text(); const truncated = rawText.slice(0, 8000); text = await aiRaw(`This is a document about a business idea. Extract the core concept and write a clear 3-5 sentence project description suitable for a project generator. Include: what it does, who it's for, and how it makes money. Write ONLY the project description. DOCUMENT CONTENT: ${truncated}`, 1500); } if (text) { document.getElementById('project-desc').value = text; status.textContent = `✓ Extracted idea from ${file.name}`; onDescInput(); } else { status.textContent = 'Could not extract idea from document'; } } catch (e) { status.textContent = `Error: ${e.message}`; } } // ── 5. Voice Conversation (interactive AI Q&A) ────────────────────────────── let convoHistory = []; let convoVoiceActive = false; async function sendConvoMsg() { const input = document.getElementById('im-convo-text'); const msg = input.value.trim(); if (!msg) return; input.value = ''; const log = document.getElementById('im-convo-log'); const userDiv = document.createElement('div'); userDiv.className = 'im-msg user'; userDiv.textContent = msg; log.appendChild(userDiv); convoHistory.push({ role: 'user', content: msg }); log.innerHTML += `
`; log.scrollTop = log.scrollHeight; try { const systemPrompt = `${PROMPT_ARMOR}You are helping someone shape a business idea for a project generator. Ask focused questions to understand: 1. What problem they're solving 2. Who their target customer is 3. How it makes money 4. What makes it different Ask ONE question at a time. Be conversational and encouraging. After 3-5 exchanges when you have enough info, summarize the idea as a clear project description (3-5 sentences) and say "Here's your project description:" followed by the summary.`; const r = await fetch('/api/ai', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 500, ...getAiAuthPayload(), usage_context: isFreeTier() ? 'free_scoring' : 'standard', system: systemPrompt, messages: convoHistory, }) }); const d = await r.json(); const reply = d.content?.find(b => b.type === 'text')?.text || 'Could you tell me more?'; convoHistory.push({ role: 'assistant', content: reply }); document.getElementById('convo-thinking').outerHTML = `
${escapeHtml(reply).replace(/\n/g, '
')}
`; log.scrollTop = log.scrollHeight; // Auto-detect when AI has produced a project description if (reply.includes('project description:') || reply.includes('Project Description:') || reply.includes('Here\'s your')) { const descMatch = reply.match(/(?:description:|Description:)([\s\S]*?)$/i); if (descMatch) { document.getElementById('project-desc').value = descMatch[1].trim(); onDescInput(); } } } catch (e) { document.getElementById('convo-thinking').outerHTML = `
Error: ${escapeHtml(e.message)}
`; } } function acceptConvoResult() { // Find the last AI message that looks like a project description const lastAiMsg = convoHistory.filter(m => m.role === 'assistant').pop(); if (lastAiMsg) { const desc = lastAiMsg.content.replace(/^.*(?:description:|Description:)/i, '').trim(); document.getElementById('project-desc').value = desc || lastAiMsg.content; onDescInput(); togglePanel('convo'); // close panel } } function toggleConvoVoice() { if (!('webkitSpeechRecognition' in window) && !('SpeechRecognition' in window)) return; const SpeechRecognition = window.SpeechRecognition || window.webkitSpeechRecognition; const mic = document.getElementById('im-convo-mic'); if (convoVoiceActive) { convoVoiceActive = false; if (window._convoRec) window._convoRec.stop(); mic.textContent = '🎤'; return; } const rec = new SpeechRecognition(); rec.continuous = false; rec.interimResults = false; rec.lang = 'en-US'; window._convoRec = rec; convoVoiceActive = true; mic.textContent = '⏹'; rec.onresult = (e) => { const text = e.results[0][0].transcript; document.getElementById('im-convo-text').value = text; sendConvoMsg(); mic.textContent = '🎤'; convoVoiceActive = false; }; rec.onend = () => { mic.textContent = '🎤'; convoVoiceActive = false; }; rec.onerror = () => { mic.textContent = '🎤'; convoVoiceActive = false; }; rec.start(); } // ── 6. Template Gallery ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── const TEMPLATES = [ { icon: '🏢', name: 'SaaS Platform', desc: 'Subscription software with auth, billing, dashboards', prompt: 'A SaaS platform that helps [target users] to [solve problem]. Monthly subscription with free trial, tiered pricing, and a self-serve onboarding flow.' }, { icon: '📒', name: 'Directory / Marketplace', desc: 'Listings, search, reviews, lead routing', prompt: 'A niche directory for [industry] professionals. Members pay monthly to list, customers search and get matched to providers. Revenue from listing fees and lead routing.' }, { icon: '🏛️', name: 'Government Compliance', desc: 'Filing, tracking, automated submissions', prompt: 'A government compliance platform that automates [specific filings] for [business type] across [jurisdiction]. Saves hours of manual paperwork.' }, { icon: '🏠', name: 'Real Estate Tool', desc: 'Property analysis, CRM, deal tracking', prompt: 'A real estate investment tool that helps investors analyze properties, track deals, and manage portfolios. Features: deal calculator, CRM, document management.' }, { icon: '🤖', name: 'AI Agent Service', desc: 'Workflow execution with human oversight and clear SLAs', prompt: 'An AI-assisted agent service that handles [task type] for [business type] under human oversight, with logged handoffs and per-task billing.' }, { icon: '📰', name: 'Authority Site', desc: 'Content, SEO, lead gen, affiliate revenue', prompt: 'An authority website for [niche] that ranks for high-intent keywords, captures leads, and monetizes through affiliate partnerships and premium listings.' }, { icon: '🛒', name: 'E-commerce Store', desc: 'Products, cart, payments, fulfillment', prompt: 'An e-commerce store selling [product type] to [target audience]. Dropshipping/print-on-demand fulfillment, integrated payments, email marketing.' }, { icon: '📊', name: 'Analytics Dashboard', desc: 'Data viz, reporting, alerts, integrations', prompt: 'A analytics dashboard that aggregates data from [sources] and gives [user type] actionable insights.
