Real-time alerts, custom reports, API integrations.' }, { icon: '🎓', name: 'Online Course / LMS', desc: 'Lessons, quizzes, certificates, payments', prompt: 'An online learning platform teaching [subject] to [audience]. Video lessons, quizzes, certificates, community forum. One-time or subscription pricing.' }, { icon: '📱', name: 'Mobile App Backend', desc: 'API, auth, push notifications, analytics', prompt: 'A mobile app backend for [app concept]. REST API, user auth, push notifications, analytics, and admin dashboard. The app helps [users] to [action].' }, { icon: '🔧', name: 'Client Portal', desc: 'Projects, invoicing, comms, file sharing', prompt: 'A client portal for [service business] that manages projects, invoicing, communication, and file sharing. Clients log in to see progress and pay invoices.' }, { icon: '⚡', name: 'Automation Service', desc: 'Workflows, API integrations, monitoring', prompt: 'An automation service that connects [System A] to [System B] for [business type]. Eliminates manual data entry, runs scheduled workflows, alerts on failures.' }, ]; function initTemplateGrid() { const grid = document.getElementById('im-tpl-grid'); if (!grid) return; grid.innerHTML = TEMPLATES.map((t, i) => `
${t.icon}
${t.name}
${t.desc}
`).join(''); } function selectTemplate(idx) { const t = TEMPLATES[idx]; if (!t) return; document.getElementById('project-desc').value = t.prompt; togglePanel('templates'); onDescInput(); // Focus textarea so user can customize the bracketed parts document.getElementById('project-desc').focus(); } // ── Panel Toggle ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function togglePanel(name) { const panel = document.getElementById(`im-panel-${name}`); if (!panel) return; const wasVisible = panel.classList.contains('visible'); // Close all panels document.querySelectorAll('.im-panel').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('visible')); document.querySelectorAll('.im-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active')); // Toggle the clicked one if (!wasVisible) { panel.classList.add('visible'); const btn = document.getElementById(`im-${name === 'templates' ? 'tpl' : name === 'convo' ? 'convo-btn' : name}`); if (btn) btn.classList.add('active'); if (name === 'voice') setInputStatus('im-voice-status', 'Voice ready. Click Voice again to stop recording.'); if (name === 'camera') setInputStatus('im-camera-status', 'Camera panel ready. Click Open camera or upload a photo.'); if (name === 'video') setInputStatus('im-video-status', 'Video panel ready. Record or upload a short clip.'); } } // ── Helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function fileToBase64(file) { return new Promise((resolve, reject) => { const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = () => resolve(reader.result.split(',')[1]); reader.onerror = reject; reader.readAsDataURL(file); }); } // Init template grid on load setTimeout(initTemplateGrid, 100); // Examples document.querySelectorAll('.ex').forEach(el=>el.addEventListener('click',()=>{ document.getElementById('project-desc').value=el.dataset.ex; onDescInput(); })); // Model loading async function loadModels() { if (V2_MODELS_CACHE) return V2_MODELS_CACHE; try { const r = await fetch('/api/ai?action=models'); V2_MODELS_CACHE = await r.json(); return V2_MODELS_CACHE; } catch { return { models: {}, providers: [] }; } } // Input handling let inferTimer; document.getElementById('project-desc').addEventListener('input',()=>{onDescInput();}); document.getElementById('project-desc').addEventListener('paste',()=>{setTimeout(onDescInput,0);}); // Handle browser back/forward cache or pre-filled text if(document.getElementById('project-desc').value.trim().length>=10){onDescInput();} function onDescInput(){ const desc=document.getElementById('project-desc').value.trim(); const btn=document.getElementById('launch-btn'); clearTimeout(inferTimer); if(desc.length<10){ document.getElementById('preview').style.display='none'; btn.disabled=true;btn.textContent='Describe your project above to begin'; INFERRED=null; return; } // Don't auto-infer — wait for user to click the button btn.disabled=false; btn.textContent=INFERRED?`Build "${INFERRED.name}" →`:'Analyze & Build →'; } function updateLaunchBtn(){ const desc=document.getElementById('project-desc').value.trim(); const btn=document.getElementById('launch-btn'); if(desc.length>=10){ btn.disabled=false; btn.textContent=INFERRED?`Build "${INFERRED.name}" →`:'Build this project →'; } else { btn.disabled=true; btn.textContent='Describe your project above to begin'; } } let TOOL_INVENTORY = null; let HEALTH_STATUS = null; async function checkHealth(){ try{ const r=await fetch('/api/health'); HEALTH_STATUS=await r.json(); if(HEALTH_STATUS.expired_or_failing?.length){ const warn=document.createElement('div'); warn.style.cssText='background:#1a0808;border:1px solid rgba(229,83,75,0.3);border-radius:8px;padding:8px 12px;margin-bottom:1rem;font-size:11px;color:#F07070'; warn.innerHTML='⚠ Credential check: '+HEALTH_STATUS.expired_or_failing.join(', ')+' need refreshing — some provisioning steps will skip. Details ↗'; document.querySelector('.page').insertBefore(warn,document.querySelector('.tbanner')||document.querySelector('.hero')); } }catch{} } checkHealth(); async function loadInventory(){ if(TOOL_INVENTORY) return; try{const r=await fetch('/api/provision?action=inventory');TOOL_INVENTORY=await r.json();}catch{} } async function inferConfig(desc){ const ae = document.getElementById('analyze-err'); if (ae) { ae.style.display = 'none'; ae.textContent = ''; } await loadInventory(); showLoadingOverlay('Analyzing your idea...', 'AI is inferring project type, tech stack, business model, and pricing'); const toolContext=TOOL_INVENTORY?` Available Dynasty tools: AI(${(TOOL_INVENTORY.ai||[]).join(',')}) Payments(${(TOOL_INVENTORY.payments||[]).join(',')}) Comms(${(TOOL_INVENTORY.comms||[]).join(',')}) Infra(${(TOOL_INVENTORY.infrastructure||[]).join(',')}) SuiteDash(${TOOL_INVENTORY.suitedash_licenses} licenses) BD(${TOOL_INVENTORY.brilliant_licenses} licenses)`:''; let timeoutId = null; try{ const ctl = new AbortController(); timeoutId = setTimeout(() => ctl.abort(), 45000); const r=await fetch('/api/ai',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, signal: ctl.signal, body:JSON.stringify({model:V2_MODEL,max_tokens:1200, ...getAiAuthPayload(), usage_context: isFreeTier() ? 'free_scoring' : 'standard', messages:[{role:'user',content:`${PROMPT_ARMOR}Analyze this project description and infer all configuration. Return ONLY valid JSON. Description: "${sanitizePromptInput(desc)}"${toolContext} Return: { "name": "Short project name (2-4 words)", "repo": "kebab-case-repo-name", "domain": "guessed-domain.com", "type_id": "one of: gov-saas|compliance|client-portal|dark-saas|enterprise-saas|bd-dir|member-dir|real-estate|job-board|lead-gen|ai-platform|ai-dashboard|ai-chat|booking-service|crm|signing-service|auth-gen|auth-pest|auth-imm|auth-freight|auth-legal|auth-hvac|auth-med|n8n|flint-proj|api-svc|landing|wp-theme|portfolio|ecom|embed-widget|suitedash-niche", "type_label": "Human readable type", "surface": "light or dark or dual", "accent": "#hexcolor most appropriate for this product", "stack": ["array", "of", "tech", "stack", "items"], "revenue_model": "subscription or transactional or marketplace or dfy", "price": "$X/mo or $X,XXX one-time — the right price for this market", "acquisition": "organic-seo or cold-email or cold-call-sms or paid-ads or partnerships", "mvp": "72h or 1w or 2w or 1m", "fonts": "font recommendation", "manual_svcs": ["clerk","stripe","gsc"], "reasoning": "2 sentences on why these choices fit the description" }`}]})}); const d = await r.json().catch(() => ({})); if (!r.ok) { const msg = typeof d?.error === 'string' ? d.error : (d?.error?.message || `Analysis request failed (${r.status})`); throw new Error(msg); } if (d?.error) throw new Error(typeof d.error === 'string' ? d.error : (d.error.message || 'Analysis failed')); const txt=d.content?.find(b=>b.type==='text')?.text||''; const m=txt.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/); if(!m) throw new Error('Could not parse analysis response'); INFERRED=safeJsonParse(m[0]); if (!INFERRED) throw new Error("Inference JSON repair failed"); showPreview(INFERRED); updateLaunchBtn(); try { document.getElementById('preview')?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'nearest' }); } catch (e2) {} }catch(e){ INFERRED = null; console.warn('Idea analysis failed:', e?.message || e); const btn = document.getElementById('launch-btn'); if (btn) { btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = 'Analyze & Build →'; } const aerr = document.getElementById('analyze-err'); if (aerr) { aerr.style.display = 'block'; aerr.textContent = e?.message || 'Analysis failed. If you use a test admin key, redeploy after setting TEST_ADMIN_KEY. Otherwise try again or use Score Free.'; } } finally { if (timeoutId) clearTimeout(timeoutId); hideLoadingOverlay(); } } function showPreview(inf){ const grid=document.getElementById('inf-grid'); grid.innerHTML=`
Project name
${inf.name}
Type
${inf.type_label}
Accent
${inf.accent}
Revenue
${inf.revenue_model} · ${inf.price}
Stack
${(inf.stack||[]).slice(0,4).join(', ')}
Acquisition
${inf.acquisition}
MVP
${inf.mvp}
Repo
${ORG}/${inf.repo}
`; if(inf.reasoning){grid.innerHTML+=`
Why
${escapeHtml(inf.reasoning)}
`;} document.getElementById('preview').style.display='block'; } // Launch document.getElementById('launch-btn').addEventListener('click',async()=>{ const desc=document.getElementById('project-desc').value.trim(); if(desc.length<10)return; // If not yet inferred, run inference first if(!INFERRED){ const btn=document.getElementById('launch-btn'); btn.disabled=true;btn.textContent='Analyzing your idea...'; await inferConfig(desc); if(!INFERRED){btn.disabled=false;btn.textContent='Analyze & Build →';return;} btn.disabled=false;btn.textContent='Build "'+INFERRED.name+'" →'; // Show preview and wait for second click to proceed return; } if (V2_MODE === 'strategic') { // Show framework screen with smart matching document.getElementById('input-screen').style.display = 'none'; document.getElementById('framework-screen').style.display = 'block'; // Auto-select frameworks based on project type if (INFERRED?.type_id) applySmartMatching(INFERRED.type_id); // Auto-set depth based on mode setDepthTier(V2_MODE === 'strategic' ? 'standard' : 'quick'); return; } // Quick build — go straight to build document.getElementById('input-screen').style.display='none'; document.getElementById('prog-screen').style.display='block'; document.getElementById('prog-title').textContent=`Building ${INFERRED.name}…`; PRGS=[]; renderProg(); updateGlobalProgress(0, 12, 'Starting build pipeline...'); await build(desc,INFERRED); }); // Progress function addP(id,l,n='',g=''){PRGS.push({id,l,n,s:'wait',g});renderProg();} function setP(id,s,n){const p=PRGS.find(x=>x.id===id);if(p){p.s=s;if(n!==undefined)p.n=n;}renderProg();} function renderProg(){ document.getElementById('prog-list').innerHTML=PRGS.map(p=>{ const c=p.s==='run'?'rn':p.s==='ok'?'ok':p.s==='er'?'er':p.s==='warn'?'warn':p.s==='sk'?'sk':''; const ic=p.s==='run'?'ir':p.s==='ok'?'io':p.s==='er'?'ie':p.s==='warn'?'iy':p.s==='sk'?'ik':'iw'; const sym=p.s==='ok'?'✓':p.s==='er'?'✕':p.s==='sk'?'—':p.s==='warn'?'!':''; const g=p.g?`
${p.g}
`:''; return`${g}
${sym}
${p.l}
${p.n?`
${p.n}
`:''}
`; }).join(''); } // GitHub — all calls proxied server-side (token stays secret) const sl=s=>s.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g,'-').replace(/^-|-$/g,''); async function gh(path,method='GET',body=null){ return fetch(`/api/github?path=${encodeURIComponent(path)}`,{method,headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},...(body?{body:JSON.stringify(body)}:{})}); } // Retry wrapper with exponential backoff. Used for any GitHub write op that // can hit secondary rate limits or transient 5xx. Throws the last error if // all retries exhaust. async function withRetry(fn, label='op', maxRetries=3, baseDelayMs=1500){ let lastErr; for (let attempt = 0; attempt <= maxRetries; attempt++) { try { return await fn(); } catch (e) { lastErr = e; if (attempt === maxRetries) break; const delay = baseDelayMs * Math.pow(2, attempt); console.warn(`[retry] ${label} failed (attempt ${attempt+1}/${maxRetries+1}): ${e.message}. Waiting ${delay}ms`); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, delay)); } } throw lastErr; } async function pushF(repo,path,content,msg){ return withRetry(async () => { const enc=btoa(unescape(encodeURIComponent(content))); const c=await gh(`/repos/${repo}/contents/${path}`); const pl={message:msg,content:enc}; if(c.ok){const x=await c.json();pl.sha=x.sha;} const r=await gh(`/repos/${repo}/contents/${path}`,'PUT',pl); if(!r.ok){ const errBody = await r.text().catch(()=> ''); throw new Error(`Push failed: ${path} (${r.status}) ${errBody.slice(0,120)}`); } }, `pushF ${path}`, 3, 1500); } // Batch push multiple files in a SINGLE git commit via the git-data API. // Massively faster and far less rate-limited than calling pushF per file. // On failure the caller should fall back to per-file pushF. // Returns { ok: true, commit_sha, file_count } on success, throws on error. async function pushFiles(repo, fileMap, message){ const entries = Object.entries(fileMap).filter(([p,c]) => typeof c === 'string' && c.length > 0 && !c.includes('[Generation incomplete]')); if (entries.length === 0) return { ok: true, commit_sha: null, file_count: 0, skipped: 'empty' }; return withRetry(async () => { // 1. Get current HEAD of main const refR = await gh(`/repos/${repo}/git/ref/heads/main`); if (!refR.ok) throw new Error(`pushFiles getRef failed: ${refR.status}`); const ref = await refR.json(); const parentSha = ref.object.sha; // 2. Get the base tree sha from the parent commit const cmR = await gh(`/repos/${repo}/git/commits/${parentSha}`); if (!cmR.ok) throw new Error(`pushFiles getCommit failed: ${cmR.status}`); const parentCommit = await cmR.json(); const baseTreeSha = parentCommit.tree.sha; // 3. Build tree with inline blob content (UTF-8 text). GitHub accepts // `content` directly on tree items, creating the blobs server-side. // Chunk into multiple tree updates if > 300 files to stay under // request size limits (each chunk rebases onto the previous). const CHUNK_SIZE = 300; let currentTreeSha = baseTreeSha; let currentParentSha = parentSha; let finalCommitSha = parentSha; for (let i = 0; i < entries.length; i += CHUNK_SIZE) { const chunk = entries.slice(i, i + CHUNK_SIZE); const treeItems = chunk.map(([path, content]) => ({ path, mode: '100644', type: 'blob', content })); const tR = await gh(`/repos/${repo}/git/trees`, 'POST', { base_tree: currentTreeSha, tree: treeItems }); if (!tR.ok) { const errBody = await tR.text().catch(()=> ''); throw new Error(`pushFiles createTree chunk ${i} failed: ${tR.status} ${errBody.slice(0,200)}`); } const newTree = await tR.json(); const isLastChunk = i + CHUNK_SIZE >= entries.length; const commitMsg = isLastChunk ? message : `${message} (chunk ${Math.floor(i/CHUNK_SIZE)+1})`; const ncR = await gh(`/repos/${repo}/git/commits`, 'POST', { message: commitMsg, tree: newTree.sha, parents: [currentParentSha] }); if (!ncR.ok) { const errBody = await ncR.text().catch(()=> ''); throw new Error(`pushFiles createCommit chunk ${i} failed: ${ncR.status} ${errBody.slice(0,200)}`); } const newCommit = await ncR.json(); currentTreeSha = newTree.sha; currentParentSha = newCommit.sha; finalCommitSha = newCommit.sha; } // 4. Update main to point at the final commit const updR = await gh(`/repos/${repo}/git/refs/heads/main`, 'PATCH', { sha: finalCommitSha, force: false }); if (!updR.ok) { const errBody = await updR.text().catch(()=> ''); throw new Error(`pushFiles updateRef failed: ${updR.status} ${errBody.slice(0,200)}`); } return { ok: true, commit_sha: finalCommitSha, file_count: entries.length }; }, `pushFiles(${entries.length} files)`, 2, 3000); } // Files that MUST be present in the deployed repo for the Next.js build to // succeed. If any of these fail to push after all retries the build should // hard-fail instead of producing a broken "live" URL. const CRITICAL_FILE_PATHS = [ 'package.json', 'src/app/page.tsx', 'src/app/globals.css', 'src/app/layout.tsx', ]; const CRITICAL_CONFIG_FILES = ['next.config.js', 'next.config.ts', 'next.config.mjs']; function isCriticalPath(p){ return CRITICAL_FILE_PATHS.includes(p) || CRITICAL_CONFIG_FILES.includes(p); } /** GitHub contents check targets: deploy target + category (fullstack gets optional route groups). */ function buildGithubVerifyPlan() { const dep = V2_DEPLOY_TARGET; const cat = String(V2_CATEGORY || '').toLowerCase(); if (dep === 'fullstack') { const required = [ 'package.json', 'src/app/page.tsx', 'src/app/layout.tsx', 'src/app/globals.css', 'src/app/not-found.tsx', 'src/app/docs/page.tsx', 'src/app/pricing/page.tsx', ]; const oneOfGroups = []; if (cat === 'ai') { oneOfGroups.push([ 'src/app/api/chat/route.ts', 'src/app/api/v1/route.ts', 'src/app/api/route.ts', 'src/app/api/data/route.ts', ]); } if (cat === 'dashboard') { oneOfGroups.push([ 'src/app/dashboard/page.tsx', 'src/app/[locale]/(auth)/dashboard/page.tsx', ]); } return { required, oneOfGroups, needNextConfig: true }; } if (dep === 'backend-only') { return { required: ['backend/main.py', 'README.md', 'SPEC.md'], oneOfGroups: [['docker-compose.yml', 'docker-compose.yaml', 'compose.yml', 'backend/Dockerfile']], needNextConfig: false, }; } if (dep === 'static') { return { required: ['package.json', 'index.html', 'README.md'], oneOfGroups: [], needNextConfig: false, }; } if (dep === 'wordpress') { return { required: ['package.json', 'README.md', 'SPEC.md'], oneOfGroups: [], needNextConfig: false }; } return { required: ['package.json'], oneOfGroups: [], needNextConfig: false }; } function encodeGithubContentPath(p) { return String(p).split('/').map((seg) => encodeURIComponent(seg)).join('/'); } /** Prepended to all U.S. government-contracting helper docs — informational only, no official affiliation. */ function govContractingDisclaimerMd() { return `> **Important — informational only:** These materials are **AI-generated planning aids**, not legal, tax, accounting, or procurement advice. Your Deputy is **not** affiliated with the U.S. government or any agency. **You must verify** NAICS codes, size standards, certifications, and solicitations on official systems (e.g. [Census NAICS](https://www.census.gov/naics/), [SAM.gov](https://sam.gov/), [USASpending](https://www.usaspending.gov/), [SBA](https://www.sba.gov/)). **Do not** treat any example opportunities, contract numbers, or award amounts as real unless you confirm them yourself. `; } async function parseDelimited(text,keys){ const result={}; for(const key of keys){ const re=new RegExp('---BEGIN:'+key+'---([\\s\\S]*?)---END:'+key+'---'); const m=text.match(re); result[key]=m?m[1].trim():''; // Update live build counters if (m && m[1].trim().length > 10) { window._buildFileCount = (window._buildFileCount || 0) + 1; window._buildWordCount = (window._buildWordCount || 0) + Math.round(m[1].trim().split(/\s+/).length); } } return result; } // ── Quality Validation: ensures free model output meets consulting-grade thresholds ── function validateOutputQuality(result, keys, maxTokens) { if (!result || typeof result !== 'object') return false; const minCharsPerKey = Math.max(200, maxTokens / 4); // Each section should be at least 25% of token budget in chars let totalChars = 0; let emptyKeys = 0; let shortKeys = 0; for (const key of keys) { const val = result[key] || ''; totalChars += val.length; if (!val || val.length < 50) emptyKeys++; else if (val.length < minCharsPerKey * 0.3) shortKeys++; // Less than 30% of expected length // Check for placeholder text (signs of lazy generation) if (val.includes('[TODO]') || val.includes('[TBD]') || val.includes('[Insert') || val.includes('[Fill in')) { shortKeys++; // Penalize placeholder text } } // Quality passes if: // 1. No more than 1 empty key // 2. No more than 30% of keys are short // 3. Total output is at least 40% of expected (maxTokens * 3 chars/token) const expectedMinChars = maxTokens * 1.2; // ~1.2 chars per token minimum if (emptyKeys > 1) return false; if (shortKeys > keys.length * 0.3) return false; if (totalChars < expectedMinChars) return false; return true; } async function ai(prompt, keys, max = 8000, phaseId = null) { // Cost-optimized model selection per phase // Strategy-critical phases use frontier models for McKinsey-grade output // Template/boilerplate phases use free models to minimize cost const PHASE_MODELS = { 'g1': 'gemini-2.0-flash', // Design system — FREE (structured template, quality sufficient) 'g2': 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', // Product docs — PAID (SPEC.md requires deep technical reasoning) 'g3': 'gemini-2.0-flash', // Tech docs — FREE (structured specs, template-driven) 'g4a': 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', // Business strategy — PAID (MUST be frontier model for consulting-grade analysis) 'g4b': 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', // Agent system — PAID (requires deep architectural reasoning) 'g5': 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile', // Backend code — FREE (Llama 70B writes good Python) 'g7': 'gemini-2.0-flash', // Frontend — FREE (template scaffolding) }; let model; if (phaseId && V2_MODEL_MAP[phaseId]) { model = V2_MODEL_MAP[phaseId]; // User override always wins } else if (phaseId && PHASE_MODELS[phaseId]) { model = PHASE_MODELS[phaseId]; // Cost-optimized default } else if (phaseId) { model = await routeModel(phaseId); } else { model = V2_MODEL; } const fallbackModels = [model, 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile', 'gemini-2.0-flash', 'llama-3.3-70b', 'Meta-Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct', 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001']; for (let attempt = 0; attempt < fallbackModels.length; attempt++) { const useModel = fallbackModels[attempt]; try { if (attempt > 0) console.warn(`AI fallback: trying ${useModel} (attempt ${attempt + 1})`); // Quality primer: help free models follow delimiter format perfectly const isFreeModel = useModel.includes('llama') || useModel.includes('gemini') || useModel.includes('mixtral') || useModel.includes('gemma') || useModel.includes('ollama/'); const qualityPrimer = isFreeModel ? `CRITICAL FORMATTING RULES: 1. Use EXACTLY the ---BEGIN:key--- and ---END:key--- delimiters shown below 2. Fill EVERY section with substantial, specific content (500+ words per section minimum) 3. Use real numbers, real names, real data — never use [placeholder] or [TBD] 4. Write as a senior consultant presenting to a board of directors 5. Include tables with | pipes | and data in every row 6. No preamble, no "Here is the content", no markdown backticks wrapping the output 7. Start your response DIRECTLY with the first ---BEGIN: delimiter ` : ''; const r = await fetch('/api/ai', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ model: useModel, max_tokens: max, ...getAiAuthPayload(), usage_context: isFreeTier() ? 'free_scoring' : 'standard', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: PROMPT_ARMOR + qualityPrimer + prompt }] }) }); if (r.status === 429) { // Rate limited — wait and try next model const wait = Math.min(5000 * Math.pow(2, attempt), 30000); console.warn(`Rate limited on ${useModel}, waiting ${wait/1000}s...`); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, wait)); continue; } if (!r.ok) { console.warn(`AI API ${r.status} on ${useModel}`); if (attempt < fallbackModels.length - 1) continue; throw new Error('AI API ' + r.status); } const d = await r.json(); if (d.error) { console.warn(`AI error on ${useModel}: ${d.error.message || JSON.stringify(d.error).slice(0,100)}`); if (d.error.message?.includes('overloaded') || d.error.message?.includes('rate') || d.error.type === 'overloaded_error') { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 3000 * (attempt + 1))); continue; } if (attempt < fallbackModels.length - 1) continue; throw new Error(d.error.message || 'AI error'); } // Track cost if (d._cost?.estimated_cost) V2_BUILD_COST += d._cost.estimated_cost; const costEl = document.getElementById('build-cost'); if (costEl && V2_BUILD_COST > 0) { costEl.style.display = 'block'; document.getElementById('cost-val').textContent = '$' + V2_BUILD_COST.toFixed(4); } const t = d.content?.find(b => b.type === 'text')?.text || ''; if (!t) { console.warn(`Empty response from ${useModel}, trying next...`); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000)); continue; } const result = parseDelimited(t, keys); // ── Quality Validation: check output meets minimum thresholds ── const qualityOk = validateOutputQuality(result, keys, max); if (qualityOk) return result; // Quality check failed — retry with Haiku (cheap but reliable) console.warn(`Quality check failed on ${useModel}, retrying with Haiku...`); try { const qr = await fetch('/api/ai', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens: max, ...getAiAuthPayload(), usage_context: isFreeTier() ? 'free_scoring' : 'standard', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: prompt }] }) }); if (qr.ok) { const qd = await qr.json(); if (qd._cost?.estimated_cost) V2_BUILD_COST += qd._cost.estimated_cost; const qt = qd.content?.find(b => b.type === 'text')?.text || ''; if (qt) { const qResult = parseDelimited(qt, keys); if (validateOutputQuality(qResult, keys, max)) return qResult; } } } catch {} return result; // Return original even if quality is low (better than nothing) } catch(e) { if (attempt < fallbackModels.length - 1) { console.warn(`Error on ${useModel}: ${e.message}, falling back...`); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000)); continue; } throw e; } } throw new Error('All AI models failed — check API keys and rate limits'); } async function aiRaw(prompt, max = 4000, costTier = 'standard') { // Cost-optimized model selection // 100x Cost Mode: FREE → FREE → cheap fallback const COST_MODELS = { premium: 'gemma-4-31b-it', // FREE (Google AI Studio) — best free model, 31B dense standard: 'gemma-4-26b-a4b-it', // FREE (Google AI Studio) — 26B MoE, fast budget: 'gemini-2.0-flash', // FREE (Google) — fast for boilerplate }; const model = COST_MODELS[costTier] || COST_MODELS.standard; const fallbackModels = [model, 'gemma-4-31b-it', 'gemma-4-26b-a4b-it', 'gemini-2.0-flash', 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile', 'llama-3.3-70b', 'Meta-Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct', 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001']; for (let attempt = 0; attempt < fallbackModels.length; attempt++) { const useModel = fallbackModels[attempt]; try { const r = await fetch('/api/ai', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ model: useModel, max_tokens: max, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: prompt }], ...getAiAuthPayload(), usage_context: isFreeTier() ? 'free_scoring' : 'standard' }) }); let d = null; try { d = await r.json(); } catch {} if (r.status === 429) { const errMsg = d?.error || d?.message || ''; if (String(errMsg).includes('guest scores') || String(errMsg).includes('registered free scores') || String(errMsg).includes('Scoring Pro fair-use limit')) { throw new Error(errMsg); } await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 3000 * (attempt + 1))); continue; } if (!r.ok) { const errMsg = d?.error || d?.message || ('AI API ' + r.status); if (attempt < fallbackModels.length - 1) continue; throw new Error(errMsg); } if (d.error) { if (d.error.message?.includes('overloaded') || d.error.message?.includes('rate')) { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 3000)); continue; } if (attempt < fallbackModels.length - 1) continue; throw new Error(d.error.message || 'AI error'); } if (d._cost?.estimated_cost) V2_BUILD_COST += d._cost.estimated_cost; const costEl = document.getElementById('build-cost'); if (costEl && V2_BUILD_COST > 0) { costEl.style.display = 'block'; document.getElementById('cost-val').textContent = '$' + V2_BUILD_COST.toFixed(4); } const t = d.content?.find(b => b.type === 'text')?.text || ''; if (t && t.length > 50) { // Update live build counters window._buildFileCount = (window._buildFileCount || 0) + 1; window._buildWordCount = (window._buildWordCount || 0) + Math.round(t.split(/\s+/).length); } if (t && t.length > 100) return t; // Quality gate: must be >100 chars if (t && t.length > 0 && attempt >= fallbackModels.length - 1) return t; // Last resort: accept anything if (attempt < fallbackModels.length - 1) { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000)); continue; } return ''; } catch(e) { if (attempt < fallbackModels.length - 1) { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000)); continue; } throw e; } } return ''; } function cx(desc,inf){ let base = `Project: ${sanitizePromptInput(inf.name)}\nDescription: ${sanitizePromptInput(desc)}\nRepo: ${ORG}/${inf.repo}\nType: ${inf.type_label}\nSurface: ${inf.surface}\nAccent: ${inf.accent}\nFonts: ${inf.fonts}\nStack: ${(inf.stack||[]).join(', ')}\nRevenue: ${inf.revenue_model} at ${inf.price}\nAcquisition: ${inf.acquisition}\nMVP: ${inf.mvp}`; // ── Planning Output (BINDING CONTRACT — must follow) ──────────────────── if (PLANNING_OUTPUT?.blueprint) { const bp = PLANNING_OUTPUT.blueprint; const entities = (bp.data_model?.entities || []).map(e => `${e.name}(${e.fields?.map(f=>f.name).join(',')})`).join('; '); const routes = (bp.api_contracts || []).slice(0, 12).map(r => `${r.method} ${r.path}`).join(', '); const naming = bp.naming_conventions || {}; base += `\n\n## ARCHITECTURE BLUEPRINT (BINDING — follow exactly):\nEntities: ${entities}\nAPI Routes: ${routes}\nAuth: ${bp.auth_pattern?.strategy || 'TBD'} with roles [${(bp.auth_pattern?.roles||[]).join(', ')}]\nNaming: files=${naming.files||'kebab-case'}, vars=${naming.variables||'camelCase'}, tables=${naming.db_tables||'snake_case'}, routes=${naming.api_routes||'/api/v1/'}\nIntegrations: ${(bp.integrations||[]).map(i=>`${i.service}(${i.env_var})`).join(', ')}`; if (bp.key_decisions?.length) base += `\nKey decisions: ${bp.key_decisions.slice(0,5).join(' | ')}`; } if (PLANNING_OUTPUT?.design_contract) { const dc = PLANNING_OUTPUT.design_contract; const ct = dc.color_tokens || {}; const tp = dc.typography || {}; base += `\n\n## DESIGN CONTRACT (BINDING — use these exact values):\nColors: bg=${ct.background}, surface=${ct.surface}, text=${ct.text_primary}, accent=${ct.accent}, border=${ct.border}, shadow=${ct.shadow_color}\nFonts: display=${tp.font_display}, body=${tp.font_body}, mono=${tp.font_mono}\nRadius: sm=${dc.components?.border_radius?.small}, md=${dc.components?.border_radius?.medium}, lg=${dc.components?.border_radius?.large}\nDark mode: ${dc.dark_mode ? 'yes' : 'no'}`; if (dc.pages?.length) base += `\nPages: ${dc.pages.map(p=>`${p.name}(${p.route})`).join(', ')}`; } // Context Compaction (Improvement 3) — inject compressed prior-phase decisions if (BUILD_COMPACTIONS.length > 0) { const signals = BUILD_COMPACTIONS.filter(c => c.phase !== 'blueprint' && c.phase !== 'design_contract').map(c => { const sigs = Object.entries(c.signals || {}) .filter(([,v]) => (Array.isArray(v) ? v.length : !!v)) .map(([k,v]) => `${k}: ${Array.isArray(v) ? v.join(', ') : v}`) .join('; '); return `[${c.phase}] ${sigs}`; }).join('\n'); if (signals) base += `\n\n## Prior Phase Decisions (maintain consistency):\n${signals}`; } // CLAUDE.md Read-Back (Improvement 6) — inject existing project context if (EXISTING_CLAUDE_MD) { base += `\n\n## Existing CLAUDE.md (iterative update — preserve these conventions):\n${EXISTING_CLAUDE_MD.slice(0, 2000)}`; } // Research data (real market intelligence from Exa.ai, NeuronWriter, Outscraper) if (RESEARCH_DATA?.summary) { base += `\n\n${RESEARCH_DATA.summary.slice(0, 1500)}`; } // Framework synthesis (consensus signals, contradictions, blind spots) if (FRAMEWORK_SYNTHESIS) { base += `\n\n## Framework Synthesis:`; if (FRAMEWORK_SYNTHESIS.consensus_signals?.length) base += `\nConsensus: ${FRAMEWORK_SYNTHESIS.consensus_signals.join('; ')}`; if (FRAMEWORK_SYNTHESIS.contradictions?.length) base += `\nContradictions: ${FRAMEWORK_SYNTHESIS.contradictions.join('; ')}`; if (FRAMEWORK_SYNTHESIS.blind_spots?.length) base += `\nBlind spots: ${FRAMEWORK_SYNTHESIS.blind_spots.join('; ')}`; } // Quantitative framework data (TAM/SAM/SOM, Unit Economics) if (V2_SCORECARD?.framework_analyses?.tam_sam_som) { base += `\n\n## Market Sizing: ${typeof V2_SCORECARD.framework_analyses.tam_sam_som === 'string' ? V2_SCORECARD.framework_analyses.tam_sam_som.slice(0, 500) : ''}`; } if (V2_SCORECARD?.framework_analyses?.unit_economics) { base += `\n\n## Unit Economics: ${typeof V2_SCORECARD.framework_analyses.unit_economics === 'string' ? V2_SCORECARD.framework_analyses.unit_economics.slice(0, 500) : ''}`; } const _cat = typeof V2_CATEGORY !== 'undefined' ? V2_CATEGORY : (inf.type_id || 'unspecified'); const _dep = typeof V2_DEPLOY_TARGET !== 'undefined' ? V2_DEPLOY_TARGET : ''; base += `\n\n## OUTPUT BAR — NON-NEGOTIABLE (every artifact in this session): - **Niche-first for "${inf.name}"**: Copy, examples, labels, docs, and code comments must read like a specialist shipped this for this exact business — not a generic SaaS template. Ban placeholder names, "Acme", lorem, and template-vendor branding in user-visible surfaces. - **Category fit (${_cat}${_dep ? ` · deploy: ${_dep}` : ''})**: Depth and IA must match what this category implies (e.g. SaaS vs directory vs authority site); do not ship a thin generic subset when the category demands more. - **Documentation as product**: SPEC, BUSINESS-SYSTEM, GTM/runbooks, MANUAL-ACTIONS, README — must be actionable, niche-terminology correct, and consistent with generated code. No filler sections; every major claim should trace to something in the repo or MANUAL-ACTIONS. - **Honesty**: Do not claim live integrations, data, or compliance that are not implemented; route real gaps to MANUAL-ACTIONS with crisp steps. - **Ship mindset**: Assume strict post-deploy checks (build, key routes, branding leak scan, project name on pages). Write so those checks pass without customer manual cleanup.`; return base; } // ── Processing Visuals ────────────────────────────────────────────────── // ── Educational Side Card ──────────────────────────────────────────────── const EDU_CONTENT = { g1: { phase: '⬡ Design System', title: 'Creating your visual identity', body: 'The AI drafts DESIGN.md — palette, type scale, component patterns, spacing, and accessibility targets. Depth follows your site package (Demo vs Enterprise Full); the file is the design contract — codegen may not implement every pattern in the first pass.', tip: '💡 DESIGN.md + CLAUDE.md steer codegen; compare shipped components to DESIGN.md — thinner archetypes may ship less UI upfront.', facts: ['Defining typography and color roles...','Specifying component states (hover, focus, disabled)...','Targeting accessible contrast (verify in implementation)...','Aligning tokens with Tailwind/theme when applicable...','Recording design intent for follow-up passes...'], preview: ['## Color Palette & Roles','| Color | Hex | Role |','| Primary | #xxx | Brand accent |','| Surface | #1E1E1E | Card bg |','| Text | #EEEDE8 | Body copy |'] }, g2: { phase: '⬡ Product Docs', title: 'Writing your product specification', body: 'SPEC.md captures intended features, stories, and acceptance criteria; ROADMAP.md and README.md depth depend on archetype. The first codegen pass may not implement every SPEC line — check BUILD-MANIFEST for deferrals and gaps.', tip: '💡 MANUAL-ACTIONS.md + BUILD-MANIFEST.json show what shipped vs manual follow-up (auth, webhooks, Search Console, etc.).', facts: ['Prioritizing MVP vs later phases...','Drafting roadmap horizons (not fixed-date promises)...','Generating .env.example and setup notes...','Listing integration handoffs by tier...'], preview: ['# SPEC.md','## P0 — MVP Features','- User authentication','- Dashboard with KPIs','- Subscription billing','- Admin panel'] }, g3: { phase: '⬡ Technical Docs', title: 'Architecting your data model', body: 'DATA-MODEL.md and API-CONTRACTS.md describe the intended schema and API surface; generated code may be a subset until later passes. KB outline counts vary with SEO/site package — verify live routes and migrations against the repo.', tip: '💡 Diff API-CONTRACTS.md against generated Route Handlers or API files; run migrations only after confirming the schema you intend to ship.', facts: ['Modeling entities and relationships...','Sketching request/response shapes and errors...','Outlining KB/SEO articles when in scope...','Noting auth and rate-limit assumptions...'], preview: ['## Core Endpoints','POST /auth/register','POST /auth/login','GET /api/v1/resources','PUT /api/v1/resources/:id'] }, g4a: { phase: '⬡ Business Strategy', title: 'Building your business engine', body: 'BUSINESS-SYSTEM.md, REVENUE-MODEL.md, and GTM-PLAYBOOK.md bundle positioning, workflows, and illustrative financial narratives. Figures are AI-generated planning aids — not audited forecasts — until validated with finance and legal advisors.', tip: '💡 Use for internal planning and fundraising prep; live automation in those docs maps to tiers — Foundation gets narratives, paid tiers get provisioning attempts where APIs succeed.', facts: ['Building illustrative revenue scenarios...','Drafting outreach / sales copy for review...','Mapping automation workflow patterns (tier permitting)...','Calculating unit economics: CAC, LTV, payback period...','Designing 3-tier pricing with feature gates...'], preview: ['## Revenue Model (illustrative)','| Month | MRR | Customers |','| 1 | $0 | 0 |','| 3 | $2.9K | 30 |','| 12 | $29K | 300 |'] }, g4b: { phase: '⬡ Agent System', title: 'Designing your AI workforce', body: 'AGENT-SYSTEM.md specifies your automation workforce — from lead intake to deal structuring. Each agent has defined triggers, inputs, outputs, and fallback procedures. Seven workflow patterns map to n8n when your tier allows integration provisioning. FAILURE-MODES.md anticipates failure scenarios with recovery playbooks.', tip: '💡 On paid tiers, the orchestrator attempts automation workflows where APIs succeed; Foundation receives the architecture in-repo and manual steps in MANUAL-ACTIONS.md. An AI consultancy charges $5,000–12,000 for comparable architecture.', facts: ['Configuring intake → evaluation → decision pipeline...','Setting up circuit breakers for each failure mode...','Defining agent triggers, inputs, and outputs...','Mapping workflow patterns to services when tier permits...'], preview: ['## Agent: Lead Intake','Trigger: New form submission','Tool: tier-dependent (e.g. voice at Enterprise)','Output: Qualified lead object','Fallback: Manual review queue'] }, g5: { phase: '⬡ Backend Code', title: 'Generating production-ready code', body: 'Most fullstack builds center on Next.js App Router plus API routes (Route Handlers) and the template data layer — not a required FastAPI service. If the fork is Python-first, you get that stack instead. SPEC.md and the repo are the source of truth; Foundation may ship stubs without live processor linkage.', tip: '💡 Webhooks and billing routes appear when the tier and module run; otherwise MANUAL-ACTIONS.md lists manual activation.', facts: ['Scaffolding API surface per template (Next.js or forked backend)...','Wiring auth/session patterns when in scope...','Adding health or readiness routes where applicable...','Implementing or stubbing webhooks when billing is tier-gated...','Docker/compose only if this template includes them...'], preview: ['// e.g. app/api/health/route.ts','export async function GET() {',' return Response.json({ ok: true })','}','// Exact paths: see SPEC.md + repo'] }, g7: { phase: '⬡ Frontend', title: 'Scaffolding your Next.js frontend', body: 'A Next.js 14 App Router frontend with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, responsive layout, dashboard, and landing page. The design system colors and fonts from DESIGN.md are already wired into the Tailwind config.', tip: '💡 HTTPS and CDN apply after the host finishes the production build — latency is host-dependent, not instant from this UI.', facts: ['Generating responsive landing page with hero section...','Building authenticated dashboard with stat cards...','Wiring Tailwind config to your brand colors...','Setting up TypeScript with strict mode...'], preview: ['// src/app/page.tsx','export default function Home() {',' return (',' '] }, pf: { phase: '⬡ GitHub', title: 'Pushing files to your repository', body: 'Every generated file is being committed to your private GitHub repository. Once complete, you can clone it locally, invite collaborators, or hand it to a development team. The repo is ready for CI/CD.', tip: '💡 Run "gh repo clone [repo] && cd [repo] && claude" (or pi) to start building with AI assistance.', facts: ['Committing design system files...','Pushing business strategy documents...','Uploading application code per template...','Adding documentation and config files...'], preview: ['feat: DESIGN.md ✓','feat: SPEC.md ✓','feat: BUSINESS-SYSTEM.md ✓','feat: app/ + API routes ✓','feat: config as generated ✓'] }, prov: { phase: '⬡ Infrastructure', title: 'Provisioning your tech stack', body: 'When your paid tier allows it, we attempt live hooks — payments, hosting linkage, database, email lists, and related modules. Foundation focuses on deploy + docs; vendor integrations follow MANUAL-ACTIONS.md or an upgrade.', tip: '💡 Stripe products and webhooks appear when billing provisioning succeeds and your tier permits. BUILD-MANIFEST.json records what ran vs deferred.', facts: ['Attempting payment product linkage (tier permitting)...','Setting up cloud project with auto-deploy...','Provisioning database when in scope...','Email/marketing lists when tier + keys allow...','Configuring monitoring when enabled...'], preview: ['Payments: try / skip (tier + keys)...','Hosting: link or pending...','Database: if in scope...','Email/SMS: if module on...','Monitoring: optional...'] }, deploy: { phase: '⬡ Deployment', title: 'Launching your authority site', body: 'For authority-site archetypes, we deploy the expanded template path — AI content, FAQs, and niche pages when that package is selected. Other archetypes deploy a leaner app; scope is reflected in your repo manifest.', tip: '💡 Time-to-URL depends on Vercel build and archetype. SEO depth matches package; see BUILD-MANIFEST.json for what this session shipped.', facts: ['Preparing deploy target for your site package...','Running build / template path when selected...','Writing or wiring content per archetype...','Applying SEO and schema when in scope...','Pushing to hosting and waiting on build...','Recording deferred work to BUILD-MANIFEST...'], preview: ['→ Resolving template / archetype...','→ Applying site package config...','→ Generating or wiring routes + content...','→ Build queue on host...','→ Verify BUILD-MANIFEST + URLs...'] }, social: { phase: '⬡ Social Media', title: 'Creating your 1-year content calendar', body: 'When your tier and site package include social output, we generate a large batch of platform-style posts (often 200+ ideas). Deferred or skipped modules leave partial files — check BUILD-MANIFEST and the repo.', tip: '💡 CSV or bulk export depends on what this session wrote; confirm files before importing into a scheduler.', facts: ['Writing LinkedIn thought leadership posts...','Crafting Twitter/X hooks under 280 chars...','Creating Instagram captions with hashtag strategy...','Scripting TikTok hooks (Hook→Content→CTA)...','Generating Facebook engagement questions...'], preview: ['[LinkedIn] Week 1','Industry insight post...','#niche #authority #expert','','[Twitter] Week 1','Punchy hook under 280 chars'] }, niche: { phase: '⬡ Niche Config', title: 'Customizing for your market', body: 'For authority / multi-page archetypes, niche config drives SEO themes, navigation, and content scaffolding. Lean packages carry a smaller subset — compare outputs to your archetype file-count doc.', tip: '💡 Page counts are indicative; V4 archetype matrices + BUILD-MANIFEST describe what shipped.', facts: ['Generating 12+ primary SEO keywords...','Building 5 topic cluster structures...','Setting up navigation with 5-7 main links...','Configuring directory categories...','Creating HSL color system from accent color...'], preview: ['site: {',' name: "Your Business"',' tagline: "Your tagline"',' domain: "yourdomain.com"','}'] }, video_script: { phase: '⬡ Video Script', title: 'Drafting your walkthrough script', body: 'A Loom-style narration outline helps you record a credible product tour without staring at a blank page.', tip: '💡 Adjust on-screen cues and timing to match what you actually ship in the repo.', facts: ['Structuring intro hook and audience...','Writing demo beat-by-beat...','Adding architecture and pricing beats...','Closing with a clear CTA...'], preview: ['[0:00–0:30] Hook','[NARRATION]: ...','[SCREEN]: Dashboard overview','[ACTION]: Click into…'] }, depth_wave: { phase: '⬡ Business depth', title: 'Generating supporting documents', body: 'Parallel strategy, legal, GTM, and investor-style files run in batches. The checklist on the left is the source of truth for what finished.', tip: '💡 This card shows overall phase context — it will not list every sub-document.', facts: [], preview: [] }, g8ob: { phase: '⬡ Onboarding', title: 'Building your setup dashboard', body: 'A self-contained HTML checklist that tracks which credentials and services still need setup. Open it locally or at /onboard on your site.', tip: '💡 Progress is saved to localStorage — you can close and reopen without losing your place.', facts: ['Mapping required credentials to checklist items...','Adding copy-to-clipboard for env var names...','Linking vendor dashboards (Clerk, Stripe, Neon)...','Generating status indicators for each service...'], preview: ['☐ Set up Clerk authentication',' → clerk.com/dashboard',' → Copy: NEXT_PUBLIC_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY','☐ Connect Stripe payments'] }, g8ts: { phase: '⬡ Testing', title: 'Writing your test suite', body: 'Vitest unit tests, React Testing Library component tests, and Playwright e2e smoke tests — all tailored to your generated code.', tip: '💡 Run "npm test" to verify your code works. Run "npm run test:e2e" for browser-level smoke tests.', facts: ['Writing API route tests with mock auth...','Building component render tests...','Creating data model validation tests...','Generating e2e smoke tests with Playwright...'], preview: ['describe("API /v1", () => {',' it("returns 200", async () => {',' const res = await fetch("/api/v1");',' expect(res.status).toBe(200);',' });'] }, g8sd: { phase: '⬡ Seed Data', title: 'Generating demo content', body: 'Realistic seed data for your business type — users, content, and transactions. Run the seeder script to populate your database immediately after setup.', tip: '💡 Run "npm run db:seed" after connecting your database to see a populated dashboard.', facts: ['Creating fictional users for your industry...','Generating sample content matching your business model...','Building transaction history for dashboard charts...','Writing executable seeder script...'], preview: ['{ "name": "Jordan Rivera",',' "email": "jordan@example.com",',' "role": "admin",',' "plan": "pro" }'] }, g8api: { phase: '⬡ API Docs', title: 'Building API collection', body: 'An OpenAPI 3.0 spec and Postman collection derived from your generated routes. Import into Postman, Bruno, or Hoppscotch to test your API immediately.', tip: '💡 Import docs/postman-collection.json into Postman and set the baseUrl variable to your deployed URL.', facts: ['Mapping API routes to OpenAPI paths...','Generating request/response schemas...','Building Postman collection with examples...','Adding auth header templates...'], preview: ['{ "openapi": "3.0.3",',' "info": { "title": "Your API" },',' "paths": {',' "/api/v1": { "get": {...} }',' }'] }, g8pb: { phase: '⬡ Launch Plan', title: 'Writing your 90-day playbook', body: 'A week-by-week action plan customized to your tier, business type, and what was provisioned. Every action item references a specific file in your repo.', tip: '💡 This is a suggested playbook — adjust timelines based on your actual pace and resources.', facts: ['Mapping Week 1 critical setup tasks...','Planning Weeks 2-4 validation milestones...','Defining Weeks 5-8 growth targets...','Setting Weeks 9-12 scale signals...'], preview: ['## Week 1: Foundation','- Day 1: Open onboard.html','- Day 2: Run seed script','- Day 3: Run test suite','- Day 7: Soft launch'] } }; let _eduFactInterval = null; /** Stop rotating “in progress” edu UI; use after a step truly finishes (e.g. social calendar). */ function settleEduCard(opts) { const { phaseText, titleHtml, body, tip, factHtml, fillWidth, fillOpacity } = opts; if (_eduFactInterval) { clearInterval(_eduFactInterval); _eduFactInterval = null; } const card = document.getElementById('edu-card'); const phase = document.getElementById('edu-phase'); const titleEl = document.getElementById('edu-title'); const bodyEl = document.getElementById('edu-body'); const tipEl = document.getElementById('edu-tip'); const factsEl = document.getElementById('edu-facts'); const fill = document.getElementById('edu-progress-fill'); const preview = document.getElementById('edu-file-preview'); if (phase && phaseText != null) phase.textContent = phaseText; if (titleEl && titleHtml != null) titleEl.innerHTML = titleHtml; if (bodyEl && body != null) bodyEl.textContent = body; if (tipEl && tip != null) tipEl.textContent = tip; if (factsEl) factsEl.innerHTML = factHtml || ''; if (fill) { fill.style.animation = 'none'; fill.style.width = fillWidth != null ? fillWidth : '100%'; fill.style.opacity = fillOpacity != null ? String(fillOpacity) : '1'; } if (preview) preview.style.display = 'none'; card?.classList.remove('pulse'); } function updateEduCard(phaseId) { const card = document.getElementById('edu-card'); const content = EDU_CONTENT[phaseId]; if (!card || !content) return; // Pulse animation card.classList.remove('pulse'); void card.offsetWidth; card.classList.add('pulse'); // Update static content document.getElementById('edu-phase').textContent = content.phase; document.getElementById('edu-title').innerHTML = content.title + ''; document.getElementById('edu-body').textContent = content.body; document.getElementById('edu-tip').textContent = content.tip; // Reset progress bar animation const fill = document.getElementById('edu-progress-fill'); if (fill) { fill.style.animation = 'none'; void fill.offsetWidth; fill.style.animation = 'eduFill 12s ease-in-out infinite'; } // Rotating facts if (_eduFactInterval) clearInterval(_eduFactInterval); const facts = content.facts || []; if (facts.length > 0) { let factIdx = 0; const factsEl = document.getElementById('edu-facts'); const showFact = () => { factsEl.innerHTML = '
' + facts[factIdx % facts.length] + '
'; factIdx++; }; showFact(); _eduFactInterval = setInterval(showFact, 4000); } else { document.getElementById('edu-facts').innerHTML = ''; } // Simulated file preview const preview = document.getElementById('edu-file-preview'); if (content.preview && preview) { preview.style.display = 'block'; preview.innerHTML = ''; const lines = content.preview; lines.forEach((line, i) => { setTimeout(() => { const div = document.createElement('div'); div.className = 'line'; div.style.animationDelay = (i * 0.15) + 's'; div.textContent = line; preview.appendChild(div); }, i * 300); }); } else if (preview) { preview.style.display = 'none'; } } function showLoadingOverlay(text, sub) { let overlay = document.getElementById('loading-overlay'); if (!overlay) { overlay = document.createElement('div'); overlay.id = 'loading-overlay'; overlay.className = 'loading-overlay'; document.body.appendChild(overlay); } overlay.innerHTML = `
${text}
${sub ? `
${sub}
` : ''}`; overlay.style.display = 'flex'; } function hideLoadingOverlay() { const overlay = document.getElementById('loading-overlay'); if (overlay) overlay.style.display = 'none'; } function updateGlobalProgress(phase, total, label) { const gp = document.getElementById('global-progress'); if (gp) { gp.style.display = 'block'; const pct = Math.round((phase / total) * 100); document.getElementById('gp-fill').style.width = pct + '%'; // Show phase progress without time estimate (estimates were inaccurate and caused anxiety) let status = ''; if (phase >= total) { status = ' · Complete!'; } document.getElementById('gp-text').textContent = (label || `Phase ${phase} of ${total}`) + status; } } function animateValue(el, start, end, duration, suffix = '') { const range = end - start; const startTime = performance.now(); function update(now) { const elapsed = now - startTime; const progress = Math.min(elapsed / duration, 1); const value = start + range * progress; el.textContent = (Number.isInteger(end) ? Math.round(value) : value.toFixed(1)) + suffix; if (progress < 1) requestAnimationFrame(update); } requestAnimationFrame(update); } // app.html — IndexedDB build checkpoints (resume after refresh / crash) const DYNASTY_CKPT_DB = 'dynasty_launcher_ckpt'; const DYNASTY_CKPT_STORE = 'checkpoint'; const DYNASTY_CKPT_VER = 2; let _dynastyCkptTimer = null; let _dynastyCkptPending = false; function dynastyOpenCkptDb() { return new Promise((resolve, reject) => { const r = indexedDB.open(DYNASTY_CKPT_DB, 1); r.onerror = () => reject(r.error); r.onsuccess = () => resolve(r.result); r.onupgradeneeded = () => { try { r.result.createObjectStore(DYNASTY_CKPT_STORE); } catch {} }; }); } async function dynastySaveBuildCheckpoint(payload) { const db = await dynastyOpenCkptDb(); return new Promise((resolve, reject) => { const tx = db.transaction(DYNASTY_CKPT_STORE, 'readwrite'); tx.objectStore(DYNASTY_CKPT_STORE).put(payload, 'active'); tx.oncomplete = () => { try { db.close(); } catch {} resolve(); }; tx.onerror = () => reject(tx.error); }); } async function dynastyLoadBuildCheckpoint() { try { const db = await dynastyOpenCkptDb(); return await new Promise((resolve, reject) => { const tx = db.transaction(DYNASTY_CKPT_STORE, 'readonly'); const q = tx.objectStore(DYNASTY_CKPT_STORE).get('active'); q.onsuccess = () => { try { db.close(); } catch {} resolve(q.result || null); }; q.onerror = () => reject(q.error); }); } catch { return null; } } async function dynastyClearBuildCheckpoint() { try { const db = await dynastyOpenCkptDb(); await new Promise((resolve, reject) => { const tx = db.transaction(DYNASTY_CKPT_STORE, 'readwrite'); tx.objectStore(DYNASTY_CKPT_STORE).delete('active'); tx.oncomplete = () => resolve(); tx.onerror = () => reject(tx.error); }); try { db.close(); } catch {} } catch {} } function dynastySerializeInf(inf) { try { return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(inf)); } catch { return { ...inf }; } } function dynastyStopCheckpointLoop() { if (_dynastyCkptTimer) { clearInterval(_dynastyCkptTimer); _dynastyCkptTimer = null; } } function dynastyEnsureCheckpointLoop(desc, inf) { dynastyStopCheckpointLoop(); _dynastyCkptTimer = setInterval(() => { if (!window._buildInProgress || !window._buildFiles) return; dynastyScheduleCheckpointSave(desc, inf); }, 32000); } function dynastyScheduleCheckpointSave(desc, inf, extra) { if (_dynastyCkptPending) return; _dynastyCkptPending = true; const run = () => _dynastyCkptDoSave(desc, inf, extra); if (typeof requestIdleCallback === 'function') { requestIdleCallback(run, { timeout: 4000 }); } else { setTimeout(run, 200); } } function _dynastyCkptDoSave(desc, inf, extra) { _dynastyCkptPending = false; try { if (!window._buildInProgress) return; const files = window._buildFiles; if (!files || typeof files !== 'object') return; const keys = Object.keys(files); if (keys.length < 3) return; const payload = { v: DYNASTY_CKPT_VER, ts: Date.now(), desc: String(desc || ''), inf: dynastySerializeInf(inf), files: JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(files)), socialCalendarMd: window._socialCalendarMd || '', nicheConfig: typeof window._nicheConfig === 'string' ? window._nicheConfig : '', isAuthority: !!isAuthority, v2DeployTarget: V2_DEPLOY_TARGET, v2Category: V2_CATEGORY, gateCompleted: !!(extra && extra.gateCompleted), prePush: !!(extra && extra.prePush), prgs: (PRGS || []).map(p => ({ id: p.id, l: p.l, n: p.n, s: p.s, g: p.g })), }; dynastySaveBuildCheckpoint(payload).catch(() => {}); } catch {} } async function dynastyHasBuildCheckpoint() { const c = await dynastyLoadBuildCheckpoint(); return !!(c && c.v === DYNASTY_CKPT_VER && c.inf && c.files && Object.keys(c.files).length > 5); } async function dynastyDiscardCheckpoint() { await dynastyClearBuildCheckpoint(); try { const b = document.getElementById('dynasty-ckpt-banner'); if (b) b.style.display = 'none'; } catch {} } async function dynastyRefreshCkptBanner() { try { const b = document.getElementById('dynasty-ckpt-banner'); const body = document.getElementById('dynasty-ckpt-banner-body'); if (!b || !body) return; const has = await dynastyHasBuildCheckpoint(); if (!has) { b.style.display = 'none'; return; } const ck = await dynastyLoadBuildCheckpoint(); body.textContent = (ck.inf.name || ck.inf.repo || 'Project') + ' · ' + Object.keys(ck.files || {}).length + ' files · saved ' + new Date(ck.ts).toLocaleString(); b.style.display = 'block'; } catch {} } async function resumeBuildFromCheckpoint() { const ck = await dynastyLoadBuildCheckpoint(); if (!ck || ck.v !== DYNASTY_CKPT_VER || !ck.inf || !ck.files) { alert('No recoverable build session found.'); return; } const isAdmin = !!localStorage.getItem('dynasty_admin_token'); const hasPaid = !!localStorage.getItem('dynasty_paid_session'); if (!isAdmin && !hasPaid) { alert('Paid or admin session required to resume a full build.'); return; } if (!isAdmin && getBuildsRemaining() <= 0) { alert('No build credits remaining. Purchase capacity to resume.'); return; } const ok = confirm('Resume saved session for "' + (ck.inf.name || ck.inf.repo) + '"?\n\nSaved: ' + new Date(ck.ts).toLocaleString() + '\nFiles: ' + Object.keys(ck.files).length + '\n\nContinues from social → deploy (skips finished steps when possible).'); if (!ok) return; INFERRED = ck.inf; try { const ta = document.getElementById('project-desc'); if (ta && ck.desc) ta.value = ck.desc; } catch {} document.getElementById('config-screen').style.display = 'none'; document.getElementById('mode-screen').style.display = 'none'; document.getElementById('input-screen').style.display = 'block'; window._buildInProgress = true; window.onbeforeunload = () => (window._buildInProgress ? 'Build in progress — closing may interrupt resume.' : null); BUILD_START_TIME = Date.now(); window.__dynastySkipBuildCredit = true; await proceedToBuild(ck.desc || '', { resume: true }); } try { document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', () => { if (document.visibilityState === 'hidden' && window._buildInProgress && window._buildFiles) { try { const d = document.getElementById('project-desc'); const desc = (d && d.value) ? d.value.trim() : ''; dynastyScheduleCheckpointSave(desc, INFERRED, { gateCompleted: true }); } catch {} } }); window.addEventListener('pagehide', () => { if (window._buildInProgress && window._buildFiles) { try { const d = document.getElementById('project-desc'); const desc = (d && d.value) ? d.value.trim() : ''; dynastyScheduleCheckpointSave(desc, INFERRED, { gateCompleted: true }); } catch {} } }); } catch {} async function dynastyContinueBuildFromPostMerge(desc, inf, files, _resumeFlags) { _resumeFlags = _resumeFlags || {}; const _res = !!_resumeFlags.resume; const repo = `${ORG}/${inf.repo}`; files['docs/V4-ARCHETYPE-FILE-COUNTS.md'] = `# V4 archetype — indicative file counts (sales parity) These ranges **approximate** what the generator targets before bonus/depth packs. Actual counts depend on tier, toggles, and template. **Authority** and **Enterprise Full** both ship the largest bundles; Authority emphasizes site factory + SEO cluster; Enterprise Full emphasizes the full integration module run. | Archetype | Indicative total files | Strategy + ops docs (indicative) | Notes | |-----------|------------------------|-----------------------------------|--------| | Demo / Express | ~28–42 | 3–8 | Skips ~78-doc depth pack; defers modules per matrix | | Landing (1-page) | ~45–70 | 10–20 | Minimal routes; many integrations deferred | | Starter (5-page) | ~55–85 | 15–28 | Extra marketing routes | | Growth | ~85–120 | 25–45 | Near-full doc set; some media deferred | | Authority site | ~95–140+ | 30–50+ | Authority content + niche config | | Enterprise Full | ~120–165+ | 90+ incl. depth | Full module surface when tier allows | Module **run / defer / skip** matrix is enforced in \`api/provision.js\` (\`ARCHETYPE_MODULE_POLICY\`) and the builder UI. *§8 marketing alignment — file count transparency.*`; const _v4SkipHeavy = getBuildProfile().archetype === 'demo_express'; // ── Generate 1-Year Social Media Calendar (all build types) ────────── if (!_res) window._socialCalendarMd = ''; if (_res && (files['social-media/SOCIAL-MEDIA-CALENDAR.md'] || '').length > 120) { window._socialCalendarMd = files['social-media/SOCIAL-MEDIA-CALENDAR.md']; addP('social', 'Social media calendar', 'Recovered from saved session'); setP('social', 'ok', 'Restored — skipped re-generation'); settleEduCard({ phaseText: '⬡ Social Media', titleHtml: 'Social calendar recovered', body: 'Using files from your saved session. Build continues from here.', tip: EDU_CONTENT.social.tip, factHtml: '
✓ Restored from IndexedDB checkpoint
', fillWidth: '100%', fillOpacity: 1, }); } else if (_v4SkipHeavy) { addP('social', 'Social media calendar', 'Skipped (Demo / Express — faster path)'); setP('social', 'sk', 'Use Enterprise full package for full calendar'); } else try { addP('social','Generating 1-year social media calendar (260 posts)','5 platforms × 52 weeks','⬡ Social Media');setP('social','run'); updateEduCard('social'); updateGlobalProgress(7, 12, 'Phase 7 of 14 · Social Media Calendar'); const socialPrompt = `Generate a 1-year social media content calendar for "${inf.name}" (${inf.type_label}). Keywords: ${(inf.stack||[]).join(', ')}. Create 20 posts (4 per platform × 5 platforms). For EACH post include ALL columns below. Platform rules: - LinkedIn: Professional thought leadership, 150-200 words, 3-5 hashtags. Best time: Tue-Thu 8-10am EST - Twitter/X: Under 280 chars, punchy hook + insight, 2-3 hashtags. Best time: Mon-Fri 9am-12pm EST - Instagram: Visual-first caption with emojis, 10-15 hashtags. Best time: Mon/Wed/Fri 11am-1pm EST - Facebook: Conversational, question-driven engagement, 3-5 hashtags. Best time: Tue-Fri 9am-1pm EST - TikTok: Script format (Hook→Content→CTA), trending style, 5-8 hashtags. Best time: Tue-Thu 7-9pm EST Content mix per platform (across 4 posts): 1 educational, 1 social proof/case study, 1 behind-the-scenes/culture, 1 promotional/CTA Return ONLY a markdown table with ALL 7 columns: | Week | Platform | Theme | Content | Hashtags | Image Prompt | Best Time | |------|----------|-------|---------|----------|-------------|-----------| | 1 | linkedin | educational | Post content here... | #tag1 #tag2 | Professional flat-lay photo of [specific scene relevant to this niche], clean white background, minimal style | Tuesday 9:00 AM EST | ...20 rows Image Prompt column: Describe a specific image that could be generated with AI (Midjourney/DALL-E) or sourced from stock. Be specific about style, composition, colors, and mood. Match the brand accent color ${inf.accent} where possible.`; const socialRaw = await aiRaw(socialPrompt, 5000, 'budget'); if (socialRaw && socialRaw.includes('|')) { window._socialCalendarMd = `# ${inf.name} — Social Media Calendar\n\n> Generated by Your Deputy\n\n${socialRaw}`; files['social-media/SOCIAL-MEDIA-CALENDAR.md'] = window._socialCalendarMd; // Also generate CSV for scheduler import const csvLines = ['Date,Platform,Content,Hashtags,Theme,Image_Prompt,Best_Time']; const rows = socialRaw.split('\n').filter(l => l.startsWith('|') && !l.includes('---') && !l.includes('Week')); rows.forEach((row, i) => { const cols = row.split('|').map(c => c.trim()).filter(Boolean); if (cols.length >= 5) { const week = parseInt(cols[0]) || (i + 1); const d = new Date(); d.setDate(d.getDate() + (week - 1) * 7); const imagePrompt = cols[5] || ''; const bestTime = cols[6] || ''; csvLines.push(`"${d.toISOString().split('T')[0]}","${cols[1]}","${cols[3].replace(/"/g,'""')}","${cols[4]}","${cols[2]}","${imagePrompt.replace(/"/g,'""')}","${bestTime}"`); } }); files['social-media/calendar.csv'] = csvLines.join('\n'); files['social-media/calendar.json'] = JSON.stringify(rows.map((row, i) => { const cols = row.split('|').map(c => c.trim()).filter(Boolean); return cols.length >= 5 ? { week: parseInt(cols[0]) || (i+1), platform: cols[1], theme: cols[2], content: cols[3], hashtags: cols[4], image_prompt: cols[5] || '', best_time: cols[6] || '' } : null; }).filter(Boolean), null, 2); setP('social','ok',`${rows.length} posts across 5 platforms`); settleEduCard({ phaseText: '⬡ Social Media', titleHtml: 'Social calendar ready ✓', body: 'Calendar files are in social-media/ (markdown, CSV, JSON). The build continues with more deliverables — watch the checklist for live status.', tip: EDU_CONTENT.social.tip, factHtml: `
✓ ${rows.length} posts saved for this session
`, fillWidth: '100%', fillOpacity: 1, }); } else { setP('social','sk','Social calendar generation skipped'); settleEduCard({ phaseText: '⬡ Social Media', titleHtml: 'Social calendar skipped', body: 'No table output from the model this run. You can add posts manually or run a fuller package later.', tip: EDU_CONTENT.social.tip, factHtml: '
See checklist row for details
', fillWidth: '100%', fillOpacity: 0.45, }); } } catch (e) { setP('social', 'sk', e.message); settleEduCard({ phaseText: '⬡ Social Media', titleHtml: 'Social calendar — error', body: 'Generation did not complete. Check the progress list; you can still continue the build.', tip: EDU_CONTENT.social.tip, factHtml: '
' + escapeHtml(String(e.message || 'Error').slice(0, 120)) + '
', fillWidth: '100%', fillOpacity: 0.45, }); } // ── Generate Video Walkthrough Script ─────────────────────────────── if (_res && (files['VIDEO-SCRIPT.md'] || '').length > 200) { addP('video', 'Video walkthrough script', 'Recovered from saved session'); setP('video', 'ok', 'Restored — skipped re-generation'); settleEduCard({ phaseText: '⬡ Video Script', titleHtml: 'Video script recovered', body: 'VIDEO-SCRIPT.md restored from checkpoint.', tip: EDU_CONTENT.video_script.tip, factHtml: '
✓ Restored from checkpoint
', fillWidth: '100%', fillOpacity: 1, }); } else if (_v4SkipHeavy) { addP('video', 'Video script', 'Skipped (Demo / Express)'); setP('video', 'sk', 'Faster demo path'); } else try { addP('video', 'Generating video walkthrough script', '', '⬡ Video Script'); setP('video', 'run'); updateEduCard('video_script'); updateGlobalProgress(7.5, 12, 'Phase 7.5 · Video Walkthrough Script'); const videoScript = await aiRaw(`Generate a 5-minute Loom-style video walkthrough script for "${inf.name}" (${inf.type_label}). The narrator is the founder showing the product to a potential customer or investor. Structure: 1. INTRO (30 seconds): Hook + who this is for + what problem it solves 2. PRODUCT DEMO (2 minutes): Walk through 3 key features. For each: what you see on screen, what to click, what happens 3. ARCHITECTURE (1 minute): Brief overview of the tech stack and why it's reliable 4. BUSINESS MODEL (1 minute): Pricing, who pays, why it's worth it 5. CTA (30 seconds): Where to sign up, what happens next, any special offer Format each section with: **[SCREEN: description of what's visible]** **[NARRATION]:** "Exact words to say..." **[ACTION]:** Click/scroll/hover description Revenue: ${inf.revenue_model} at ${inf.price} Stack: ${(inf.stack||[]).join(', ')} MVP Timeline: ${inf.mvp}`, 3000, 'budget'); if (videoScript && videoScript.length > 200) { files['VIDEO-SCRIPT.md'] = `# Video Walkthrough Script — ${inf.name}\n\n> 5-minute Loom-style product demo script\n> Generated by Your Deputy\n\n${videoScript}`; setP('video', 'ok', 'VIDEO-SCRIPT.md ready'); settleEduCard({ phaseText: '⬡ Video Script', titleHtml: 'Video script ready ✓', body: 'VIDEO-SCRIPT.md is in the repo bundle. Next: messaging, pitch, and parallel strategy documents.', tip: EDU_CONTENT.video_script.tip, factHtml: '
✓ Walkthrough script drafted
', fillWidth: '100%', fillOpacity: 1, }); } else { setP('video', 'sk', 'Script generation skipped'); settleEduCard({ phaseText: '⬡ Video Script', titleHtml: 'Video script skipped', body: 'Short or empty model output. You can record from SPEC + README instead.', tip: EDU_CONTENT.video_script.tip, factHtml: '', fillWidth: '100%', fillOpacity: 0.45, }); } } catch (e) { setP('video', 'sk', e.message); settleEduCard({ phaseText: '⬡ Video Script', titleHtml: 'Video script — error', body: 'Script step did not finish. Continuing with other documents.', tip: EDU_CONTENT.video_script.tip, factHtml: '', fillWidth: '100%', fillOpacity: 0.45, }); } if (!_v4SkipHeavy) { const dw = EDU_CONTENT.depth_wave; settleEduCard({ phaseText: dw.phase, titleHtml: dw.title, body: dw.body, tip: dw.tip, factHtml: '
Strategy + legal + GTM wave in progress — follow the checklist
', fillWidth: '55%', fillOpacity: 0.75, }); } // ── Generate A/B GTM Messaging Variants ───────────────────────────── if (_v4SkipHeavy) { addP('ab', 'A/B messaging', 'Skipped (Demo / Express)'); setP('ab', 'sk', 'Faster demo path'); } else try { addP('ab', 'Generating A/B messaging variants', '', '⬡ A/B Test'); setP('ab', 'run'); const abRaw = await aiRaw(`Generate 2 distinct messaging variants for "${inf.name}" (${inf.type_label}). For EACH variant (A and B), provide: 1. Headline (8 words max, benefit-driven) 2. Subheadline (15 words max, specific outcome) 3. CTA button text (3-5 words, action verb + outcome) 4. Email subject line for cold outreach 5. One-sentence elevator pitch Variant A should be DIRECT and BENEFIT-FOCUSED (e.g., "Save 10 hours a week on X") Variant B should be CURIOSITY-DRIVEN and PROVOCATIVE (e.g., "What if X was never a problem again?") Format: ## Variant A: [strategy name] Headline: [text] Subheadline: [text] CTA: [text] Email Subject: [text] Elevator Pitch: [text] ## Variant B: [strategy name] [same format] Product: ${inf.name} | Revenue: ${inf.revenue_model} at ${inf.price} | Audience: ${inf.acquisition}`, 2000, 'budget'); if (abRaw && abRaw.includes('Variant')) { files['AB-MESSAGING.md'] = `# A/B Messaging Variants — ${inf.name}\n\n> Test both variants. Run the winner. Generated by Your Deputy.\n\n${abRaw}`; setP('ab', 'ok', '2 messaging variants ready'); } else { setP('ab', 'sk', 'A/B generation skipped'); } } catch(e) { setP('ab', 'sk', e.message); } // ── Generate Investor Pitch + Readiness + Legal (parallelized) ────── if (_v4SkipHeavy) { addP('pitch', 'Pitch deck content', 'Skipped (Demo / Express)'); setP('pitch', 'sk', 'Faster demo path'); addP('investor', 'Investor readiness', 'Skipped (Demo / Express)'); setP('investor', 'sk', 'Faster demo path'); addP('legal', 'Legal templates', 'Skipped (Demo / Express)'); setP('legal', 'sk', 'Faster demo path'); } else { addP('pitch', 'Generating investor pitch summary', '', '⬡ Pitch Deck'); setP('pitch', 'run'); addP('investor', 'Generating investor readiness assessment', '', '⬡ Investor Ready'); setP('investor', 'run'); addP('legal', 'Generating legal templates', '', '⬡ Legal'); setP('legal', 'run'); const scoreContext = V2_SCORECARD ? `Viability Score: ${V2_SCORECARD.composite?.toFixed?.(1) || 'N/A'}/10. Verdict: ${V2_SCORECARD.verdict || 'N/A'}. Scores: ${JSON.stringify(V2_SCORECARD.scores || {}).slice(0, 500)}` : ''; const synthContext = FRAMEWORK_SYNTHESIS ? `Consensus: ${(FRAMEWORK_SYNTHESIS.consensus_signals || []).join('; ')}. Contradictions: ${(FRAMEWORK_SYNTHESIS.contradictions || []).join('; ')}` : ''; const [pitchR, investorR, legalR] = await Promise.allSettled([ aiRaw(`Generate a 10-section investor pitch summary for "${inf.name}" (${inf.type_label}). This is the content for a pitch deck — each section is one slide. Write as a founder pitching to an angel investor or seed fund. 1. **Title Slide:** Product name, one-line value prop, founding team credential 2. **Problem:** The specific pain (quantify with $ or hours lost). 3 bullet points. 3. **Solution:** What the product does differently. 1 paragraph + 3 key features. 4. **Market Size:** TAM / SAM / SOM with dollar figures and methodology. 5. **Business Model:** Revenue model, pricing, unit economics summary (CAC, LTV, LTV:CAC). 6. **Traction / Milestones:** What's built, what's live, key metrics (even if projected). 7. **Go-to-Market:** Primary channel, funnel math, 12-month customer growth target. 8. **Competition:** 3 competitors + positioning differentiator. Use a 2x2 matrix description. 9. **The Ask:** What funding is needed, what it buys (runway, hires, marketing), expected milestones. 10. **Team:** Why this team wins (credentials, domain expertise, unfair advantages). Revenue: ${inf.revenue_model} at ${inf.price} | Acquisition: ${inf.acquisition} | MVP: ${inf.mvp} ${V2_SCORECARD ? 'Viability Score: ' + V2_SCORECARD.composite.toFixed(1) + '/10 — ' + V2_SCORECARD.verdict : ''} Format each section with ## heading and concise, data-rich content. No filler.`, 4000, 'standard'), aiRaw(`You are a startup advisor preparing a founder for an investor due diligence meeting. Answer ALL of the following questions thoroughly for this business: Business: ${inf.name} (${inf.type_label}) Description: ${desc} Revenue Model: ${inf.revenue_model} at ${inf.price} Acquisition: ${inf.acquisition} MVP Timeline: ${inf.mvp} ${scoreContext} ${synthContext} ## 1. Overview a. What is the solution? b. How does it work? c. What problem does it solve? d. Why would customers purchase this over competitors? ## 2. Team & Capabilities a. Skills required? b. Skill gaps? c. Why this team? ## 3. Market Timing a. Why now? b. Why not before? c. Cost of delay? ## 4. Product Validation a. How are customers currently solving this? b. Early feedback expectations? c. Pricing reaction to ${inf.price}? d. Key assumptions to validate? ## 5. Target Market a. Primary market? b. Adjacent markets? c. 3 specific customer segments? ## 6. Market Proof 3+ external sources validating the opportunity. ## 7. Competitive Advantage a. Top 3 competitors b. Compare each c. Sustainable moat? ## 8. Traction & Stage a. Steps from napkin to MVP b. Year 1-3 projections c. Unit economics d. Pricing strategy? ## 9. Intellectual Property a. IP opportunities? b. What to protect first? ## 10. Funding a. Capital needed? b. Stages and amounts? c. Use of funds? ## 11. Business Model Product, service, marketplace, or hybrid? ## 12. Founder Commitment a. Time commitment? b. Full-time milestone? c. Timeline? ## 13. Critical Needs a. Top 3 immediate needs? b. Key risks + mitigations? ## 14. Failure Risks Top 5 reasons this could fail + mitigation. ## 15. Support Needed Beyond capital, what accelerates this? Write thorough, specific answers. Use markdown formatting.`, 8000, 'standard'), aiRaw(`Generate Terms of Service and Privacy Policy templates for "${inf.name}" (${inf.type_label}). These are STARTER TEMPLATES — include a disclaimer that they should be reviewed by legal counsel. ## Terms of Service Include: Acceptance of terms, Description of service, User accounts, Payment terms (${inf.revenue_model} at ${inf.price}), Cancellation/refund policy, Intellectual property, Limitation of liability, Governing law (Delaware), Modifications, Contact info placeholder. ## Privacy Policy Include: Information collected (account data, usage data, cookies), How information is used, Third-party services (Stripe for payments, analytics), Data retention, User rights (access, deletion, portability), GDPR/CCPA compliance notes, Children's privacy (13+), Contact info placeholder. Write in professional legal language but keep it readable. Use numbered sections. Include [COMPANY NAME], [CONTACT EMAIL], and [EFFECTIVE DATE] as placeholders.`, 4000, 'budget'), ]); const pitchRaw = pitchR.status === 'fulfilled' ? pitchR.value : ''; if (pitchRaw?.length > 300) { files['PITCH-DECK.md'] = `# Investor Pitch Summary — ${inf.name}\n\n> Seed-stage pitch content · ${new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US',{year:'numeric',month:'long',day:'numeric'})}\n> Generated by Your Deputy Intelligence Engine\n\n${pitchRaw}`; setP('pitch', 'ok', 'PITCH-DECK.md ready'); } else { setP('pitch', 'sk', 'Pitch generation skipped'); } const investorRaw = investorR.status === 'fulfilled' ? investorR.value : ''; if (investorRaw?.length > 500) { files['INVESTOR-READINESS.md'] = `# ${inf.name} — Investor Readiness Assessment\n\n> Due diligence preparation · ${new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US',{year:'numeric',month:'long',day:'numeric'})}\n> Viability Score: ${V2_SCORECARD?.composite?.toFixed?.(1) || 'N/A'}/10\n> Generated by Your Deputy Intelligence Engine\n\n${investorRaw}`; setP('investor', 'ok', 'INVESTOR-READINESS.md ready'); } else { setP('investor', 'sk', 'Investor assessment skipped'); } const legalRaw = legalR.status === 'fulfilled' ? legalR.value : ''; if (legalRaw?.length > 500) { files['docs/LEGAL-TEMPLATES.md'] = `# Legal Templates — ${inf.name}\n\n> ⚠️ DISCLAIMER: These are starter templates. Have them reviewed by legal counsel before publishing.\n> Generated: ${new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US',{year:'numeric',month:'long',day:'numeric'})}\n\n${legalRaw}`; setP('legal', 'ok', 'ToS + Privacy Policy ready'); } else { setP('legal', 'sk', 'Legal generation skipped'); } } // ── Generate CI/CD Pipeline Config ──────────────────────────────────── try { addP('cicd', 'Generating CI/CD pipeline', '', '⬡ DevOps'); setP('cicd', 'run'); const stack = (inf.stack||[]).join(', '); files['.github/workflows/ci.yml'] = `# CI/CD Pipeline — ${inf.name} # Auto-runs on push to main and pull requests name: CI on: push: branches: [main] pull_request: branches: [main] jobs: lint-and-test: runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - uses: actions/checkout@v4 - uses: actions/setup-node@v4 with: node-version: '20' cache: 'npm' - run: npm ci - run: npm run lint --if-present - run: npm test --if-present type-check: runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - uses: actions/checkout@v4 - uses: actions/setup-node@v4 with: node-version: '20' cache: 'npm' - run: npm ci - run: npx tsc --noEmit --if-present backend-test: runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - uses: actions/checkout@v4 - uses: actions/setup-python@v5 with: python-version: '3.11' - run: pip install -r backend/requirements.txt - run: cd backend && python -m pytest --if-present || echo "No tests yet" `; // vercel.json — NEVER set framework:null or outputDirectory for Next.js // Vercel auto-detects Next.js framework and output directory const isNextJs = (inf.stack||[]).some(s => s.toLowerCase().includes('next')); const vconf = { headers: [{ source: '/(.*)', headers: [ { key: 'X-Frame-Options', value: 'DENY' }, { key: 'X-Content-Type-Options', value: 'nosniff' }, { key: 'Referrer-Policy', value: 'strict-origin-when-cross-origin' } ]}] }; // Only set outputDirectory for non-Next.js static sites if (!isNextJs) { vconf.outputDirectory = 'public'; vconf.rewrites = [{ source: '/api/:path*', destination: '/api/:path*' }]; } files['vercel.json'] = JSON.stringify(vconf, null, 2); setP('cicd', 'ok', 'GitHub Actions + vercel.json ready'); } catch(e) { setP('cicd', 'sk', e.message); } // ── Generate Email + Discovery + Competitive (parallelized) ────────── addP('emails', 'Generating email onboarding sequence', '', '⬡ Email Drip'); setP('emails', 'run'); addP('discovery', 'Generating customer discovery script', '', '⬡ Discovery'); setP('discovery', 'run'); if (RESEARCH_DATA?.competitors?.length) { addP('compete', 'Generating competitive teardown', '', '⬡ Competitive Intel'); setP('compete', 'run'); } { const _edcPromises = [ aiRaw(`Generate a 5-email welcome/onboarding sequence for "${inf.name}" (${inf.type_label}). These emails go to NEW CUSTOMERS who just signed up. Goal: activate them, show value, reduce churn.
